The company offers enterprise software solutions, including corporate information management system, corporate identity and access management systems, enterprise equipment tracking, enterprise equipment tracking systems, e-government projects, RFID-based software and integration solutions, vehicle tracking and security control systems, logistic warehouse and container tracking systems, textile tracking and process management solutions, and social media tracking systems, as well as staff, visitor, and person tracking systems. It also provides health system solutions, such as sterilization, patient, baby, hospital textile, hospital fixtures, medical equipment, and hospital warehouse tracking systems; and cloud services. In addition, the company information system solutions, which include server, virtualization disaster recovery center, traceability and process management applications, and components supply of enterprise information systems. Further, it offers various command center and security solutions; and smart technology solutions comprising smart highway, bridge, tunnel, secure campus, factory and manufacture, conference hall and meeting room, classroom, distance education, and city and traffic solutions. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: Arena Bilgisayar Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Arena Bilgisayar Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. engages in the wholesale of electronics and telecommunication products in Turkey. The company is involved in the wholesale trading of office and consumer products, corporate products, printers, software, consumer electronics, and mobile phones and other mobile devices, as well as personal computers, by-products, and peripherals; online electronics retailing and marketplace management businesses; and sale of sensors, security camera, and internet of things products. It also offers various solutions, such as automation and Internet of Things, server infrastructure, data center, Arena energy, cloud technology, and security solutions. In addition, the company provides Bulutum.com, an end-to-end integrated cloud platform; Pencere.com, a communication and interaction portal; and Paynet, which provides payment, collection, and financial solutions; and Arena Galaxy, a portal to test the technology. Further, it offers GoPlus, a service for buying and selling phones, tablets, smartwatches, and computers purchase service; and Arena Connect, that offers smart communication devices purchasing and distribution services, as well as payment intermediary, technical, and logistics services. Arena Bilgisayar Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1991 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Arsan Holding Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Arsan Holding Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production and sale of yarn in Turkey and internationally. It offers threads, knitted and woven fabrics, and knitted, woven fabrics, and yarn dyeing and finishing products. The company is also involved in electricity generation and distribution; Construction, and Shopping Mall Management and Leasing; finance; marketing; and operation of hotel under the A'ija brand name. The company was formerly known as Arsan Tekstil Ticaret ve Sanayi Anonim Sirketi and changed its name to Arsan Holding Anonim Sirketi in February 2026. Arsan Holding Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 1984 and is based in Kahramanmaras, Turkey.

stocks.name: ARTEMIS HALI
stocks.description: Artemis Hali Anonim Sirketi designs, manufactures, and sells carpets in Turkey and internationally. It offers handmade carpets and machine-made carpets, runners, prayer rugs, rugs, blankets, and textile products. The company operates under the ANETTA, ANKA, ART SHAPE, ART STYLE, DAVINA, EMMA, EVA, HERMES COLOR, HERMES STYLE, CHARISMA, LIA, MURANO, PALACE, PERA PALACE, PIA, PIENA, ROSA, SAMOA, and VANESSA brand names. It also offers its products online. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Arzum Elektrikli Ev Aletleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.address: Defterdar Mahallesi Otakçilar Caddesi Sinpas Flatofis Binasi
stocks.description: Arzum Elektrikli Ev Aletleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells home appliances in Turkey, Egypt, Saudi Arabia, the Netherlands, Germany, Kosovo, Kuwait, and internationally. The company offers kitchen appliances comprising blenders, food processors, choppers, mixers, stand mixers, juicers, coffee and tea machines, kettles, grill and sandwich makers, and mini ovens, as well as espresso machines and tea makers. It also provides bagless and bagged vacuum cleaners, vertical vacuum cleaners, steam cleaners, garment steamers, steam and steam generator irons, travel irons, air conditioning products, fans, and water heaters; and dowry set products. In addition, the company offers personal care appliances, such as hot air blow stylers, hair curling irons, hair straightening products, IPL hair removal devices, hair dryers, epilators, and bathroom scales. It sells its products under the Arzum, Arzum OKKA, and Felix brands. Arzum Elektrikli Ev Aletleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Astor Enerji A.S.
stocks.description: Astor Enerji A.S. engages in the manufacturing of transformers, and medium and high voltage switching products for industrial facilities. The company offers power transformers and special type transformers; and distribution transformers, such as oil type distribution, dry type, special distribution, and grounding, as well as MT shunt reactors and magnetic control shunt reactors. It also provides H.V. equipment, including metal enclosed switchgears, RMU, metal clad switchgears, MV switches and disconnectors, concrete kiosk, mobile substation, and HV live-tank circuit breakers. In addition, the company serves energy generation, transmission, and distribution sectors. Astor Enerji A.S. was incorporated in 1983 and is based in Sincan, Turkey.

stocks.name: Ata Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Ata Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. operates in REIT sector in Turkey. The company focuses on commercial real estate valuables and projects. Its projects include real estate, retail, office, and logistics. Ata Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. was founded in 1997 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Atakey Patates Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Atakey Patates Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and supplies French fries in Turkey. It provides potato wedges, spicy coated potato wedges, crinkle potato, spicy coated crinkle potato, coated cage fries, and spicy coated cage fries. The company also offers frozen cheese stick and onion rings. It supplies its products to quick service restaurants. The company also exports its products to the United Arab Emirates, China, Iraq, the United Kingdom, and Uzbekistan. Atakey Patates Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: ATP Yazilim ve Teknoloji Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: ATP Yazilim ve Teknoloji Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, develops enterprise software and system solutions in Turkey, the Netherlands, Malta, China, and Europe. The company offers restaurant POS, customer experience, O2O and delivery, restaurant management, and MDM and support center services under the Zenia brand; brokerage software, portfolio management, RPA and automation, mobile and virtual branch, finance applications, and market connectivity solutions under the Tradesoft brand; CRM, ERP and e-accounting, custom business solutions, and corporate support services under the Digital brand; green and carbon certificates trading under the GreenX brand; and autonomous robots under the RobotX brand. It also provides cloud computing and artificial intelligence solutions; business solutions, including ERP, CRM, and BI ve HR, e-transformation, capital markets, and robotic; infrastructure and security solutions, such as data security, and threat and system management; system solutions comprising database, switchboard, data leak prevention, payment and barcode, and UPS systems; and IT services, which include licensing, integration, and research and development consultancy, as well as managed, professional, and field services. It serves hospitality, finance, retail, energy, and logistics sectors. The company was formerly known as ATP Ticari Bilgisayar Agi ve Elektrik Guc Kaynaklari Uretim Pazarlama ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to ATP Yazilim ve Teknoloji Anonim Sirketi in April 2023. ATP Yazilim ve Teknoloji Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Akin Tekstil Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Akin Tekstil Anonim Sirketi manufactures and sells fabric, yarn, and ready-made garments in Turkey and internationally. The company offers cotton and blend, wool, real indigo, corduroy, linen, garment dye, and yarn dyed fabrics; men's and women's trousers and bermudas; and women's shirts, dresses, skirts, blouses, and other products. It exports its products. Akin Tekstil Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Atlas Menkul Kiymetler Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Atlas Menkul Kiymetler Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. engages in the provision of portfolio management services related to securities traded on national and international stock exchanges. It manages a portfolio composed of capital market instruments. The company was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Avrasya Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Avrasya Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi operates in the real estate investment field in Turkey and Georgia. Avrasya Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1994 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Avrupa Yatirim Holding A.S.
stocks.description: Avrupa Yatirim Holding A.S. provides healthcare and telecommunication services in Turkey. The company operates, equips, rents, and leases private hospitals, medical centers, dialysis centers, medical analysis and x-ray laboratories, and other healthcare facilities. It also owns, purchases, sells, transfers, and rentals communication facilities, including telephone, telex, and fax. The company was formerly known as Baysan Trafo Radyatorleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Avrupa Yatirim Holding A.S. in December 2014. The company was incorporated in 1998 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: A.V.O.D Kurutulmus Gida ve Tarim Ürünleri Sanayi Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: A.V.O.D Kurutulmus Gida ve Tarim Ürünleri Sanayi Ticaret Anonim Sirketi provides dried vegetables and derivatives, and vegetable-based ready meals under the Farmer`s Choice brand name in Turkey. It engages in the agricultural production, processing, international sales, and marketing. The company's products include sun dried tomatoes, baked semi dried tomatoes, sauces and bruschettas, fermented vegetables, and roasted products. It serves hotels, restaurants, and the catering industry, as well as retail chains. The company also exports its products. A.V.O.D Kurutulmus Gida ve Tarim Ürünleri Sanayi Ticaret Anonim Sirketi was founded in 2003 and is based in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Avrasya Petrol ve Turistik Tesisler Yatirimlar Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Avrasya Petrol ve Turistik Tesisler Yatirimlar Anonim Sirketi engages in the oil facility operation and tourism activities. It buys, sells, imports, and exports petroleum and petroleum products, fuel oil, diesel, and LPG, as well as buys, sells, and rents real estate and machinery and equipment. The company was formerly known as Merkez B Tipi Menkul Kiymetler Yatirim Ortakligi AS and changed its name to Avrasya Petrol ve Turistik Tesisler Yatirimlar Anonim Sirketi in January 2011. Avrasya Petrol ve Turistik Tesisler Yatirimlar Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Altin Yunus Çesme Turistik Tesisler A.S.
stocks.description: Altin Yunus Çesme Turistik Tesisler A.S. operates tourist hotels and facilities in Turkey. It operates touristic hotels, facilities, and accommodation services. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. Altin Yunus Çesme Turistik Tesisler A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Yasar Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Ayen Enerji A.S.
stocks.description: Ayen Enerji A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production, distribution, and trading of electricity in Turkey and internationally. It generates electricity through hydroelectric, solar, and wind sources. The company also engages in trading activities. Ayen Enerji A.S. was incorporated in 1990 and is based in Ankara, Turkey. Ayen Enerji A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Aydiner Insaat AS.

stocks.name: Ayes Celik Hasir Ve Cit Sanayi A.S.
stocks.address: General Ali Riza Gürcan Cad. Metropol Center
stocks.description: Ayes Celik Hasir Ve Cit Sanayi A.S. produces wire mesh in Turkey. It offers wire meshes, such as Q type, R type, fence, and special wire meshes; prop reinforcement stands; panel fences and cage wire meshes; deformed bars, including coil bars and wire rods, cutted deformed bars, stirrup rebars, and steel rebars. The company also provides machinery manufacturing products comprising drawing, wire cutting, butt welding, and mesh bending machines. Ayes Celik Hasir Ve Cit Sanayi A.S. was incorporated in 1978 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Bak Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Bak Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells printed, unprinted, and laminated flexible packaging for various sectors in Turkey and internationally. The company offers packaging products for snack food; cookies and cakes; chocolate and confectionaries; breads and fresh food; instant food and drinks; dried food and pastas; coffee and tea; chemicals and hygiene; and other products. It exports its products primarily to Western Europe. Bak Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. Bak Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Bakioglu Holding AS.

stocks.name: Balatacilar Balatacilik Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Balatacilar Balatacilik Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. provides automotive parts in Turkey. It manufactures, imports, and sells drums, brakes, and clutch linings. The company was incorporated in 1988 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Banvit Bandirma Vitaminli Yem Sanayii Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Banvit Bandirma Vitaminli Yem Sanayii Anonim Sirketi operates as a food company in Turkey. It engages in production, processing, sales, and marketing of feed, breeder eggs, day-old broiler chicks, live broilers, broiler meat, and further processed products. The company also exports its products. It distributes its products through the branches and dealers. The company was incorporated in 1968 and is headquartered in Balikesir, Turkey. Banvit Bandirma Vitaminli Yem Sanayii Anonim Sirketi is a subsidiary of BRF GmbH.

stocks.name: Barem Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.address: Ibni Melek OSB Mahallesi TOSBI Yol 4
stocks.description: Barem Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi manufactures and markets packaging solutions in Turkey. It offers corrugated cardboard, sheet, box paper, and offset printed box products. The company serves food, cosmetics, textiles, and electronics. It also exports its products. Barem Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Bastas Baskent Cimento Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Bastas Baskent Cimento Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells ready-mixed concrete and cement products in Turkey. The company was incorporated in 1967 and is based in Ankara, Turkey. Bastas Baskent Cimento Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Parficim S.A.

stocks.name: Baskent Dogalgaz Dagitim Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Baskent Dogalgaz Dagitim Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. engages in natural gas distribution activities in Ankara. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey. Baskent Dogalgaz Dagitim Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is a subsidiary of Torunlar Enerji Sanayi Ve Tic.A.S.

stocks.name: Bayrak EBT Taban Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Bayrak EBT Taban Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi manufactures and sells PVC and thermo shoe soles in Turkey. The company offers faylon, single color, single painted sole, single TPU, bottom piece, painted base with bottom piece, TPU sole with bottom piece, and winter soles. It offers soles for men, women, and children. The company was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: BATI EGE GMYO
stocks.address: Kayalar Mah. 6030 Sq. Sinpas AquaCity F1
stocks.description: Bati Ege Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S., an investment company, invests in the real estate sector in Denizli and the rest of Aegean Region. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Denizli, Turkey.

stocks.name: Bera Holding A.S.
stocks.address: Nisantasi Mah. Dr. M. Hulusi Baybal Cd.
stocks.description: Bera Holding A.S. operates in the paper and cardboard, machinery, oil, construction and building materials, marble, textiles, tourism, and food sectors worldwide. It offers paper, printing, and packaging products under the KOMEKS OKUL DEFTERLERI, Konya Kagit Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., MURATLI KARTON, Speed, Ultra copy, ekstra copy, Konya Kagit Günesli Isletmesi, and KONKA AMBALAJ brands; machinery products under the MPG, WAGNER, and SPARK brands; petroleum products under the KONGAZ and afrapetrol brands; food, livestock, and marketing products under the GOLDA, kardelen, MELDA, and ANATOLi brands; and construction and building materials under the DivaMDF, Bauplast, Divalam, FENSTERBAU, KOMPEN, KOMYAPI, komline, mialime, Laodica, and Divapan brands. The company also offers marble and minerals under the adaçal, Hisar, and KOMBASSAN MERMER brands; textile products under the KOVEKA brand; tourism and hotel management products under the Bera Alanya and Bera Konya brands; and rollers under the ART BEARINGS, URB, and mgm brands. The company was formerly known as Kombassan Holding A.S. and changed its name to Bera Holding A.S. in July 2017. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Konya, Turkey.

stocks.name: Beyaz Filo Oto Kiralama A.S.
stocks.description: Beyaz Filo Oto Kiralama A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the used car auctions, new vehicle fleet sales, retailing, and after-sales services in Turkey. The company serves fleet rental companies. Beyaz Filo Oto Kiralama A.S. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: Bosch Fren Sistemleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.address: Fethiye OSB Mahallesi Sari Cad. No.26
stocks.description: Bosch Fren Sistemleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells hydraulic brake systems for passenger cars and light commercial vehicles in Turkey and internationally. It offers servo brakes; and brake master cylinders and assist systems. The company was incorporated in 1975 and is headquartered in Bursa, Turkey. Bosch Fren Sistemleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Robert Bosch GmbH.

stocks.name: Büyük Sefler Gida Turizm Tekstil Danismanlik Organizasyon Egitim Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Büyük Sefler Gida Turizm Tekstil Danismanlik Organizasyon Egitim Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S., together with its subsidiaries, operates a chain of restaurants in Turkey and internationally. The company operates restaurants under the BigChefs, Numnum, Numnum Streetfood, Buselik, and Akademi BigChefs brands. It also franchises its restaurants. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: 1000 YATIRIMLAR HOL.
stocks.description: 1000 Yatirimlar Holding Anonim Sirketi, an investment company, focuses on transportation, software, and energy solutions. It engages in the micro mobility, electric charging station, renewable energy, software, toy, and moped rental businesses. The company was incorporated in 2022 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Bizim Toptan Satis Magazalari A.S.
stocks.description: Bizim Toptan Satis Magazalari A.S. engages in the wholesale and retail of fast-moving consumer goods in Turkey. The company sells food products, including dry food, milk and diary, snack and bakery, delicatessen and breakfast, meat and meat products, and fruit and vegetable; drink and non-alcoholic beverages; cigarette and tobacco; cleaning items; personal care and cosmetics; paper; household appliances; energy and lighting, stationery-office supplies; communication items; pet products; and private label products through various brands. It also operates 182 stores and an online platform. The company sells its products to wholesalers, merchants, specialized retailers, hotels, grocery stores, markets, supermarkets, restaurants, and cafes, as well as gas station markets, school canteens, SEC Market business partners, kiosks, catering businesses, corporate and individual customers, and commercial taxpayers. Bizim Toptan Satis Magazalari A.S. was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. The company operates as a subsidiary of Yildiz Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Bilici Yatirim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Bilici Yatirim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. engages in the textiles, tourism, and energy businesses in Turkey. The company is involved in the production of textiles, fabrics, cloths, dyes, finishing, and sizing operations or outsourcing; and semi-finished products and raw materials, including cotton fabric, polyester, and yarn, as well as woven and polyester clothing. It also engages in buying, renting, constructing buildings; tourism activities; and electricity production. Bilici Yatirim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1950 and is based in Adana, Turkey.

stocks.name: Bms Celik Hasir Sanayi Ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Bms Celik Hasir Sanayi Ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi operates in the steel business. It manufactures and trades in steel mesh, cold drawn bar iron, high carbon steel wire, cold drawn coil, galvanized wire, knitting wire, fencing wire, stirrups, kilt, and ready-made iron products. The company was founded in 1971 and is based in Manisa, Turkey.

stocks.name: Bms Birlesik Metal Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Bms Birlesik Metal Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells galvanized steel wires in Turkey and internationally. It provides hot-dip galvanized, Zn-AI coated steel, stranded, and black annealed wires. The company serves the automotive, energy, agriculture, construction, environmental protection and security system, and industrial application sectors. It also exports its products to approximately 45 countries, including Europe, North American, and South American countries. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Bantas Bandirma Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Bantas Bandirma Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. engages in tin packaging production activities in Turkey. The company offers cheese cans; oil cans for olive and vegetable oil companies; olive and pickle tin boxes; and thinner, antifreeze, and motor oil cans. It also serves the mineral oil and paint industries. The company exports its products to various countries. The company was incorporated in 1986 and is headquartered in Balikesir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Bogazici Beton Sanayi Ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Bogazici Beton Sanayi Ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi produces, manufactures, and sells ready-made concrete and aggregates under the Bosphorus Concrete brand in Turkey. It offers standard concretes; special and technical concretes, such as fiber reinforced, colored, pressed concrete, ready plaster, screed, concrete with visible aggregate surface, white, and impermeable concretes; and boutique concretes for industrial field, marine structure, and construction and precast production sites. Bogazici Beton Sanayi Ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Borlease Otomotiv A.S.
stocks.description: Borlease Otomotiv A.S. offers car rental services in Turkey. It provides mobility services, such as short-term car rental, self-owned car management, fleet management program, telematics, implant, and fuel managements. The company also provides vehicle / driver support, including damage and accident, malfunction, tire, periodic maintenance, vehicle return, and driver support services. The company was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: BOR SEKER
stocks.description: Bor Seker A.S. manufactures and sells sugar products in Turkey. It offers granulated sugar, sugar cubes, stick sugar, wet beet pulp, bagged beet pulp, and molasses. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Bossa Ticaret ve Sanayi Isletmeleri T.A.S.
stocks.description: Bossa Ticaret ve Sanayi Isletmeleri T.A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production, marketing, and sale of textile products in Turkey. It also offers various denim and sportswear fabric products. The company was incorporated in 1951 and is headquartered in Adana, Turkey.

stocks.name: Berkosan Yalitim Ve Tecrit Maddeleri Üretim Ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Berkosan Yalitim Ve Tecrit Maddeleri Üretim Ve Ticaret A.S. engages in the manufacture, import, and export of insulation and insulation materials in Turkey and internationally. The company offers flat-bonded polyethylene, polypropylene and cross-linked polyethylene foam for sectors, such as construction, automotive, packaging, fitting, shoes and bags, and lifestyle. It also provides a range of services, such as interstory screed application to wall and roof insulation; soundproofing and thermal insulation in parquet to refrigerate cooler vehicle insulation; air conditioning inside and outside tools to sound and vibration isolation; heat and noise prevention in mechanical installations; and sound and vibration absorbing band. In addition, the company offers heat and sound insulation; solar energy system isolation; split air-conditioning system isolation; heating system isolation; material for sports, sea, and entertainment products; and wastewater system isolation. It provides its products under the Foamex, Airpack, Polyberk, Proberk, Airfoam, and Reflekt X brand names. The company was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Birikim Varlik Yonetim Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Birikim Varlik Yonetim Anonim Sirketi operates as an asset management company in Turkey. The company engages in the purchase and sale of receivables and other assets of banks, private financial institutions, and other financial institutions; and collection of purchased receivables from the debtor. It also provides consultancy and intermediary services in restructuring the receivables and other assets of banks and other financial institutions; and consultancy services to companies in the areas of corporate and financial restructuring, as well as involved in the real estate activities. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Birikim Varlik Yonetim Anonim Sirketi operates as a subsidiary of Altinhas Yatirim Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Birlik Mensucat Ticaret ve Sanayi Isletmesi A.S.
stocks.description: Birlik Mensucat Ticaret ve Sanayi Isletmesi A.S. supplies and sells manufactured fabrics in Turkey. The company offers towels, home textiles, and bedding products under the SOLEY brand. Birlik Mensucat Ticaret ve Sanayi Isletmesi A.S. was incorporated in 1966 and is headquartered in Kayseri, Turkey.

stocks.name: Borusan Birlesik Boru Fabrikalari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Borusan Birlesik Boru Fabrikalari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures, produces, and sells steel pipes in Turkey. It offers spiral (helical) welded pipes, HSAW, SAWL and ERW line pipes, natural gas pipes, fire installation, special shaped, boiler tubes, industrial pipes and profiles, water pipes, construction pipes and profiles, SRM installation pipes, hydraulic cylinder tubes, cold drawn pipes, advanced processed pipes, precision pipes and profiles, and OCTG pipes. The company also exports its products. It serves water, construction, industrial, automotive, and energy applications. The company was formerly known as Borusan Mannesmann Boru Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Borusan Birlesik Boru Fabrikalari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. in November 2023. The company was incorporated in 1958 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Borusan Birlesik Boru Fabrikalari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of BMB Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Batisöke Söke Çimento Sanayii T.A.S.
stocks.description: Batisöke Söke Çimento Sanayii T.A.S. manufactures and sells clinker and cement products in Turkey and internationally. The company offers portland cement clinkers and potassium silicate cement; and aggregates and cement bypass dust. It also provides ecoBATI CEM II C/M (L-W) 42,5 N; CEM IV/B (P-W) 32.5 R Pozzolanic Cement; CEM II/B-M (L-W) 42.5 R Portland Compound Cement; CEM II/A-M (P-L) 42.5 R Portland Compound Cement; CEM I 42.5 R-SR5 sulphate resistant Portland Cement; and CEM I 42.5 R Portland Cement. The company also exports its products. The company was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. Batisöke Söke Çimento Sanayii T.A.S. is a subsidiary of Batiçim Bati Anadolu Çimento Sanayii Anonim Sirketi.

stocks.name: Batiçim Bati Anadolu Çimento Sanayii Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Batiçim Bati Anadolu Çimento Sanayii Anonim Sirketi operates in the cement industry in Turkey and internationally. It operates through Products based on Stone and Soil; Ready-mixed Concrete; Port Services; and Electricity Production segments. The company offers cement clinkers and potassium silicate cements; sulphate resistant, compound, and pozzolanic cements; and aggregate and cement bypass dust products. It is also involved in port operations; gravel and sand quarrying; and the production and sale of electricity. Batiçim Bati Anadolu Çimento Sanayii Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Burçelik Bursa Çelik Döküm Sanayii A.S.
stocks.description: Burçelik Bursa Çelik Döküm Sanayii A.S. engages in the steel casting and machinery manufacturing businesses in Turkey and internationally. It provides stationary crushing and screening plants, such as jaw, impacts, cone crushers, sieves, sand machine, vertical shaft breakers, hammer breakers, and supplementary equipment that includes bunkers and feeders, conveyor belts, products silos, automation systems, and washers; and mobile crushing and screening units comprising mobile jaw, impact, and cone crushers, as well as mobile sieve and padder. The company also manufactures and sells hydromechanical components, including voltage, suction pipe, inlet pipe, etc. that operate under high pressure for hydroelectric power plants; ship container crane jibs, adapters, and ship loading facilities for the shipbuilding industry; and mineral crushers, jaw crushers, cone crushers, rotor crushers, mobile crawler crushers, and steel casting spare parts for the mining industry. In addition, it provides machining and welding products. The company's products are used in automotive, iron and steel production, cement, power generation, marine, industrial valve, heavy construction machinery, industrial machinery, and mining and crushers industries. Burçelik Bursa Çelik Döküm Sanayii A.S. was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Bursa, Turkey.

stocks.name: Burçelik Vana Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Burçelik Vana Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. engages in production, manufacturing, import, sales, and marketing of industrial valves in Turkey and internationally. The company offers wafer, lug, double flanged, two piece PTFE, and vulcanized rubber lug butterfly valves; flanged 2 piece, monoblock wafer type, two/three piece threaded, geothermal, floating / trunnion flanged, welded oil and gas, top entry, threaded / socket weld class 800, and double block and bleed ball valves; cast iron, forged, knife, and elastomer coated gate valves; and casted and forged globe valves. It also provides flanged / welded swing, forged threaded / socket weld swing, flanged threaded/ welded piston, forged threaded / socket weld piston, double flap wafer / lug type, wafer check, and spring loaded type wafer check valves; lubricated / nun-lubricated flanged and PFA coated flanged plug valves; hygienic strainers, hygienic butterfly, and hygienic check valves; and diaphragm valves, as well as T and Y type strainers. In addition, the company offers electric and pneumatic actuators, limit switch and gear boxes, selenoid valves, and positioners. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Nilüfer, Turkey.

stocks.name: Bulbuloglu Vinc Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.address: Organize Sanayi Bölgesi, Oguz Cad. No:21
stocks.description: Bulbuloglu Vinc Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi manufactures and sells cranes and custom-designed machinery. It offers travelling cranes, gantry cranes, process cranes, lifting groups, jib cranes, and crane equipment, as well as provides technical services, spare parts, control, and inspection services for the steel, energy, automotive, shipyards and ports, mining, and industrial production industries. Bulbuloglu Vinc Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: Baydoner Restoranlari A.S.
stocks.description: Baydoner Restoranlari A.S. operates, manages, and franchises chain of restaurants in Turkey and Iraq. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Çan2 Termik A.S.
stocks.description: Çan2 Termik A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the generation and sale of electricity in Turkey and Venezuela. The company operates a thermal power plant with an installed capacity of 340 MWm/330 MWe. It is also involved in the establishment, commissioning, and renting of coal-based electric energy production facility; purchase, sale, manufacturing, assembly, and import of natural stone and mineral ores in finished and semi-finished forms; oil extraction services; and investment activities. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Casa Emtia Petrol Kimyevi ve Turevleri San. Tic. A.S.
stocks.description: Casa Emtia Petrol Kimyevi ve Turevleri San. Tic. A.S. engages in trading of commodities in Turkey. The company trades in physical goods such as oil, gold, and agricultural products. It offers gasoline, diesel, and fuel oil products; and operates six fuel stations. The company was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: CATES ELEKTRIK
stocks.description: Çates Elektrik Üretim Anonim Sirketi engages in the generation electricity through its thermal power plant. The company operates a total installed capacity of 314.68 MW and an annual generation capacity of 2,386,GWh. Çates Elektrik Üretim Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 2014 and is based in Mugla, Turkey.

stocks.name: Coca-Cola Içecek Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Coca-Cola Içecek Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production, sale, and distribution of sparkling and still beverages in Turkey, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Central Asia, and the Middle East. The company offers soft drinks, fruit juice, iced teas, water and sparkling water, sports and energy drinks, and coffee. It sells its products under the Coca-Cola, Coca-Cola Zero Sugar, Coca-Cola Light, Diet Coke, Fanta, Sprite, Sprite Zero Calories, Crush, Crystal Cola, Schweppes, Fusetea, Cappy, Piko, Damla, Damla Minera, Bon Aqua, Al Waha, Arwa, Dasani, Dasani Minera, Kinley, Kinley Soda, Power Ade, Monster Energy, Burn, Roar, Predator Energy, and Costa Coffee brands. Coca-Cola Içecek Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Çelik Halat ve Tel Sanayii A.S.
stocks.description: Çelik Halat ve Tel Sanayii A.S. provides steel wire ropes and wires in Turkey and internationally. The company offers steel wire ropes, such as general-purpose ropes; crane ropes comprising plastic-coated core wire ropes, rotation-resistant wire ropes, and non-rotation-resistant wire ropes; marine ropes; mining ropes; elevator ropes, including pre-stretched elevator wire ropes; fishery ropes; forestry ropes, such as swaged wire ropes; and oil and gas ropes for the construction, maritime, fishing, oil, and mining industries, as well as for use in elevators, chair lifts, and cranes. It also provides industrial steel, industrial galvanized steel, and patented wires for the automotive, white goods, agriculture, defense, furniture, and construction industries; single and multi-strand ropes; and mechanical and galvanized mechanical spring wires. In addition, the company offers pre-stressed concrete strands for pre-stressed and post-tensioned and post-tensioned bridge beam manufacturing, prefabricated building elements, ground and mine anchors, nuclear power plants, silo construction, and residential and commercial building construction applications; and ACSR wires and strands. It also serves the port, marine, forestry, energy and sustainable energy, building, cable car, rubber, and other manufacturing industries. The company was incorporated in 1962 and is based in Kartepe, Turkey. Çelik Halat ve Tel Sanayii A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Artas Insaat Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.

stocks.name: Çemas Döküm Sanayi A.S.
stocks.description: Çemas Döküm Sanayi A.S. provides alloyed grinding products for the cement and mining industries. It offers grinding media balls and cylpebs. The company also produces cast parts, nodular and grey iron, and machining parts for use in the agriculture, automotive, construction and machinery, white goods, pumps, reducers, and machineries, such as knuckle, reducer housing, axle housing, transmission housing, weight, transmission parts, wheel hubs, oil sump, brake disc, reducer housing cover, flywheel, gearbox, cover, crankshaft pulley, axle components, engine cap, flywheel housing, agricultural ancillary equipment, brake discs and brake levers, suspension components, gear sets and gearboxes, differential components, exhaust manifolds, transmission housing parts, pistons, brackets, engine components, seat plates, brake drums, flywheels, control arms, differansiyel parçalari, crane load-bearing parts, housing, bearing housing, and fittings. Çemas Döküm Sanayi A.S. was incorporated in 1976 and is based in Kirsehir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Ceo Event Medya A.S.
stocks.description: Ceo Event Medya A.S. engages in the event management business in Turkey and internationally. The company conducts openings, seminars, symposiums, meetings, and concerts and campaigns, as well as organizes events for private or public offices, institutions, and organizations in various fields and subjects. It is involved in congress, entertainment, sports, fair, design, and corporate event management. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Cimbeton Hazir Beton ve Prefabrik Yapi Elemanlari Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.address: Isiklar Mah. Eski Kemalpasa Cad. No:5
stocks.description: Cimbeton Hazir Beton ve Prefabrik Yapi Elemanlari Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production, sale, trade, and transportation of cement, ready-mixed concrete, bulk and bagged cement, and lime for construction and industrial application in Turkey. The company was founded in 1950 and is based in Izmir, Turkey. Cimbeton Hazir Beton ve Prefabrik Yapi Elemanlari Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi operates as a subsidiary of Cimentas Izmir Cimento Fabrikasi Turk A.S.

stocks.name: Çimentas Izmir Çimento Fabrikasi Türk A.S.
stocks.description: Çimentas Izmir Çimento Fabrikasi Türk A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production, trading, sale, and transportation of bulk and bagged cement in Turkey. The company offers cement, ready mixed concrete, and aggregate products. It is also involved in waste management and sale of fuel. The company was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. Çimentas Izmir Çimento Fabrikasi Türk A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Aalborg Portland Espana SL.

stocks.name: Consus Enerji Isletmeciligi ve Hizmetleri A.S.
stocks.description: Consus Enerji Isletmeciligi ve Hizmetleri A.S. operates as an energy service company in Turkey. The company is involved in the operation of biomass power plants; and cogeneration, trigeneration, and solar plants totaling 85 megawatts (MW). Consus Enerji Isletmeciligi ve Hizmetleri A.S. was incorporated in 2014 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Consus Enerji Isletmeciligi ve Hizmetleri A.S. is a subsidiary of Global Yatirim Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Cosmos Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Cosmos Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the purchase, sale, trade, loading, unloading, storage, and distribution of petroleum and petroleum derivative products in Turkey. The company purchases and sells paintings, sculptures, and works of art, as well as carries out related commercial activities. It also draws mechanical, electrical, and construction projects; participates in construction contracting works; constructs and sells residences, workplaces, and commercial buildings; purchases lands to build buildings; and provides engineering and architectural services. Further, the company installs hospital rooms, operating rooms, laboratories, clean rooms, and air conditioning systems; establishes monitoring and control rooms in subways, stadiums, and hospitals, and performs maintenance and repair of the installed systems. Additionally, it produces and sells electrical and electronic automated, distribution, and medium voltage and low current panels for industrial facilities, energy facilities, shopping malls, and hospitals. Further, the company takeovers, transfers, operates, operates, and franchising shops of wholesale and retail purchase; and engaged in sale, distribution, import and export of hamburgers and hamburger by-products, and materials. The company was formerly known as Cosmos Yatirim Ortakligi AS and changed its name to Cosmos Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi in December 2013. Cosmos Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 1995 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Creditwest Faktoring Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Creditwest Faktoring Anonim Sirketi provides factoring services for domestic and international transactions. The company was formerly known as Creditwest Faktoring Hizmetleri A.S. and changed its name to Creditwest Faktoring Anonim Sirketi in July 2012. Creditwest Faktoring Anonim Sirket was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: CarrefourSA Carrefour Sabanci Ticaret Merkezi A.S.
stocks.description: CarrefourSA Carrefour Sabanci Ticaret Merkezi A.S. engages in the retail business in Turkey. It operates hypermarkets, supermarkets, and franchises. The company was incorporated in 1991 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. CarrefourSA Carrefour Sabanci Ticaret Merkezi A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Haci Ömer Sabanci Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Cuhadaroglu Metal Sanayi ve Pazarlama A.S.
stocks.description: Cuhadaroglu Metal Sanayi ve Pazarlama A.S. manufactures and sells aluminum doors and windows in Turkey and internationally. The company operates through Metal and Aluminum segment. It offers doors and windows, sliding, and facade systems; automatic sliding and revolving doors, and KTS glazed folding door systems, as well as glass accessories; office partition systems; and fire and bullet proof joinery systems, and bomb resistant facades. The company also operates in architectural application departments. It sells its products under the Interal, Interax, Interwall, Intersecure, and Interdigi brands. Cuhadaroglu Metal Sanayi ve Pazarlama A.S. was founded in 1954 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: CVK Maden Isletmeleri Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: CVK Maden Isletmeleri Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi engages in production, marketing and sale of chrome, marble, lead, zinc, copper, silver, gold, and magnesite ores. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: CW Enerji Mühendislik Ticaret ve Sanayi Anonim Sirketi
stocks.address: Antalya Organize Sanayi Bölgesi 1. Kisim Atatürk Bulvari No:20
stocks.description: CW Enerji Mühendislik Ticaret ve Sanayi Anonim Sirketi operates in the photovoltaic power generation sector in Turkey. It provides solar panels; solar packs; heating, cooling, and hot water products; inverters; solar equipment; electric vehicle chargers; charge controllers; energy storage solutions; and solar lighting solutions. The company also offers solar powered camera systems and signages, LED lighting systems, solar-powered irrigation systems, off-grid and on-grid solutions, technical service and maintenance agreement, and application and follow-up counseling services. CW Enerji Mühendislik Ticaret ve Sanayi Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Antalya, Turkey.

stocks.name: Dagi Giyim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Dagi Giyim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., together with its subsidiary, produces, markets, and retails ready-to-wear products for men, women, and kids in Turkey and internationally. The company primarily produces and sells underwear, pajamas, nightgowns, tracksuits, plus size, maternity and postpartum clothes, and swimsuits and beach shorts. It also offers casual wear, including T-shirt, crop tops/tanks, shorts, sweatshirt/jacket, pants, sweatpants, dress, shirt, and maternity casual wear; bras, panties, and under wear; home-sleepwear; beachwear, such as bikini, bikini tops and bottoms, beach dress, mayokini, and pareo; and sportswear. In addition, the company provides accessories, such as lingerie and hair accessories, socks, sunglasses, bags, towels, slippers, hats, and beanies. It sells its products through online, retail stores, wholesale channels, and franchises. Dagi Giyim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: DAP Gayrimenkul Gelistirme A.S.
stocks.description: DAP Gayrimenkul Gelistirme A.S. engages in the real estate business in Turkey. It is involved in the construction and development of residences, office, commercial, business centers, holiday villages, hotels, schools, and private hospital projects. The company was incorporated in 1981 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Dardanel Onentas Gida Sanayi A.S.
stocks.description: Dardanel Onentas Gida Sanayi A.S. engages in the seafood business in Turkey and internationally. The company produces and sells canned food, including tuna, salmon, sardines, mackerel, anchovy, and other seafood; frozen food comprising mussels and other seafood; and fish by-products, such as fish meal and oil. Dardanel Onentas Gida Sanayi A.S. was incorporated in 1981 and is headquartered in Çanakkale, Turkey.

stocks.name: Denge Yatirim Holding A.S.
stocks.description: Denge Yatirim Holding A.S. operates in the logistics, real estate, and technology sectors in Turkey and internationally. The company is involved in the production of movies, TV series, documentaries, national and international cinema, television, and digital broadcasting platforms; and preparation and marketing of commercials, television programs, and other content. It also provides integrated port services; transportation services, such as FTL  LTL, micro distribution, and fleet; and storage services. In addition, the company engages in the sales, distribution, and after-sales services for computer and peripheral products. Further, it offers access, network, and security solutions, as well as financial services. Additionally, the company engages in construction contracting activities, such as engineering and architecture, project development, housing, and business center production. Denge Yatirim Holding A.S. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Derluks Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Derluks Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, operates in the clothing, energy, and food sectors in Türkiye and internationally. The company primarily offers menswear products. It also engages in the production and sale of solar power, as well as distribution and sale of fast-moving consumer goods. The company was formerly known as Derluks Deri Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi and changed its name to Derluks Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi in March 2021. The company was incorporated in 2002 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Türkiye.

stocks.name: Derimod Konfeksiyon Ayakkabi Deri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Derimod Konfeksiyon Ayakkabi Deri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. provides leather clothing, jackets, and shoes for men and women in Turkey and internationally. The company offers leather clothing products comprising suede clothing, leather jackets and coats, leather trench coats and overcoats, teddy bears, leather vests, and softwear; shoulder and handbags, crossbody bags, backpacks, clutch and portfolio bags, leather bags, box and woven bags, laptop and briefcase bags, messenger and waist bags, and travel bags; accessories, including wallets, card holders, belts, charms, socks, and care products; children's products; and shoes, such as sneakers, loafers, ballet shoes, flats, high heels, boots, sandals, slippers, espadrilles, flat and comfort shoes, and casual and classic shoes. It sells its products under the Derimod, D-Pack, Derimod Studio, Teddy, Geox, Caterpillar, Harley Davidson, Skechers, Alberto Guardiani, and Birkenstock brands through its leased stores, e-commerce, and dealerships. Derimod Konfeksiyon Ayakkabi Deri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1975 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Desa Deri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Desa Deri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures, sells, exports, and imports leather garments in Turkey. The company offers leather jackets, clothing, shoes, bags and accessories, backpacks, saddlery products, and other leather accessories for men and women. The company markets and sells its products through wholesale and retail sales channels, as well as through online stores. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Desa Deri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Çelet Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Despec Bilgisayar Pazarlama ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Despec Bilgisayar Pazarlama ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi distributes information technology consumables to the computer companies in Turkey and internationally. The company offers phones, computer and tablet accessories, printer consumables, home systems, security cameras, mobile device accessories, and data storage products; and toner, ink cartridges, ribbons, backup products, paper products, and accessories. The company was formerly known as Indeks Teknolojik Ürünler Dagitim A.S. and changed its name to Despec Bilgisayar Pazarlama ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi in October 1998. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Deva Holding A.S.
stocks.description: Deva Holding A.S. manufactures, markets, and sells pharmaceutical products in Turkey. The company offers antineoplastic and immunomodulating agents; dermatological products; systemic hormanal preparations; anti-infective and antiparasitic products for systemic use; food supplements; and electrolyte solutions. It also provides products in the areas of urogenital system and sex hormones, blood and blood forming organs, cardiovascular system, musculoskeletal system, nervous system, alimentary tract and metabolism, respiratory system, urinary systems, connective tissue, and sensory organs. In addition, the company offers various products in sterile and non-sterile forms, including liquids, semi-solids, solids, cephalosporins, penicillin, hormone and inhalation products, solid and liquid oncology, animal health products, active pharmaceutical ingredients, ampoules, liquid and lyophilized vials, eye drops, and medical ampoules for sterile injectable products, as well as cologne. It also exports its products to approximately 60 countries. The company was incorporated in 1958 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Deva Holding A.S. is a subsidiary of Eastpharma S.à R.L.

stocks.name: Datagate Bilgisayar Malzemeleri Ticaret Anonim Sriketi
stocks.description: Datagate Bilgisayar Malzemeleri Ticaret Anonim Sriketi distributes information technology products in Turkey. The company provides smart phones, computer, tablets, modems, notebooks, and smart phone accessories, as well as security, wearable technology, smart life product, artificial technologies, modems, and virtual reality products, as well as smart phone accessories. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Datagate Bilgisayar Malzemeleri Ticaret Anonim Sriketi operates as a subsidiary of Indeks Bilgisayar Sistemleri Mühendislik Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi.

stocks.name: Dogus Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Dogus Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. has been incorporated in accordance with capital market law. Dogus Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.'s which is traded on the Borsa Istanbul, main activity is to invest in properties, create, manage, make the necessary changes in the portfolio, minimize the risk of variation in real estate; property related capital market instruments, invest and monitor continuously the real estate based projects and take the necessary measures to protect, also research to increase the value of the portfolio. The headquarter of the Company is registered in Dogus Center Maslak, Maslak Mahallesi Ahi Evran Cad. No: 4/23 Maslak, Sariyer-Istanbul. Dogus Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is incorporated in July 25, 1997 in Turkey.

stocks.name: Doganlar Mobilya Grubu Imalat Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.address: Idealtepe Mah. Rifki Tongsir Cad. No:107
stocks.description: Doganlar Mobilya Grubu Imalat Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi engages in the manufacture and sale of furniture in Turkey. It manufactures and markets a range of furniture products for living rooms, bedrooms, dining rooms, youth rooms, kitchen, and bathrooms, as well as beds. The company provides accessories, lighting, decorative items, garden furniture, and home textiles. It offers its products under the Dogtas, Kelebek, Lova Sleep, Kelebek Kitchen & Bathroom, Ruum Store, and Biga Home brand names. The company was formerly known as Dogtas Kelebek Mobilya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Doganlar Mobilya Grubu Imalat Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi in January 2022. The company was incorporated in 1935 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Diriteks Dirilis Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Diriteks Dirilis Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells blankets and non-slip carpets in Turkey. Its products include single, double, and baby blankets. The company is also involved in provision of marketing services; and manufacture of yarn used in blanket and carpet production. Diriteks Dirilis Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1996 and is based in Isparta, Turkey.

stocks.name: Ditas Dogan Yedek Parça Imalat ve Teknik A.S.
stocks.description: Ditas Dogan Yedek Parça Imalat ve Teknik A.S. manufactures and sells steering and suspension parts for vehicle manufacturers in Turkey and internationally. It offers rod ends, torque rods, idler arms, axial joints, pitman arms, drag links, ball joints, track control arms, stabilizer links, and v-torque rods for commercial vehicles and passenger cars. The company was incorporated in 1972 and is based in Nigde, Turkey. Ditas Dogan Yedek Parça Imalat ve Teknik A.S. operates as a subsidiary of BDY Group Insaat A.S.

stocks.name: Demisas Döküm Emaye Mamülleri Sanayi Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Demisas Döküm Emaye Mamülleri Sanayi Anonim Sirketi engages in the manufacture and sale of iron, cast iron, enameled products, enameled cast iron vessels, and other products in Turkey. The company offers Volan, air brake disc, pressure plate, campane, bracket, shaft arm, manifolt, and caliper body products. It provides its products for the white goods and automotive industries. The company exports its products to Germany, Belgium, the Czech Republic, France, Holland, England, Spain, Italy, Hungary, Poland, Romania, Russia, Slovakia, and Tunisia. The company was incorporated in 1974 and is headquartered in Kocaeli, Turkey.

stocks.name: Dinamik Isi Makina Yalitim Malzemeleri Sanayi Ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Dinamik Isi Makina Yalitim Malzemeleri Sanayi Ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi engages in the marketing and partial production of insulation hanger pins, plastic dowels, and cold room nails in Turkey. The company offers polyethylene sheets, pipes, and wicks; XLPE foam insulation products, including dynafoam XPE, adhesive, and aluminum coated crosslinked polyethylene foams; XPS foam insulation products, such as dynafoam XPS under tile thermal boards, refrigerated panel sheets, thermal insulation boards, decorative brick coating, and sandwich panel sheets; dynaflex rubber sheets and tubes; and custom designed products. It also provides mineral fiber products comprising glass, stone, and ceramic wools; pyramid shaped foam used in visible interior surface applications, industrial areas, radio and recording studios, entertainment venues, conference halls, generator rooms, compressors, and waiting rooms and acoustic viol; and packaging products, including insulated cold chain packaging, packaging profiles, and corner protectors. In addition, it offers joint filler rovings; PVC insulaton covering boards; and jackets valves and PVC insulation jackets. Dinamik Isi Makina Yalitim Malzemeleri Sanayi Ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 1991 and is based in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Dogus Otomotiv Servis ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Dogus Otomotiv Servis ve Ticaret A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in automotive and real estate businesses in Turkey. The company operates through Automotive and Real Estate segments. The Automotive segments engages in the importing, marketing, and selling passenger and commercial vehicles, spare parts of Volkswagen Group brands VW, Audi, Seat, Cupra, Porsche, Bentley, Lamborghini, Meiller, Scania, Scania Power Solutions, Wielton semi-trailers, and Thermoking vehicle cooling systems; purchasing and selling used vehicles through dealers under the DOD brand; sales and service of Novamarine brand boats and speedboats, as well as after-sales services and spare parts field; and sales and service operations of Aerofoil brand e-foil products and Mate brand electric-assisted bicycles. The Real Estate segment operates a portfolio consisting of real estate-based assets and rights. It also offers installation and operation of charging units, charging stations, and charging network; and creates and manages a portfolio of real estate and real estate-based capital market instruments. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Dogus Otomotiv Servis ve Ticaret A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Dogus Holding A.S.

stocks.name: DO & CO Aktiengesellschaft
stocks.description: DO & CO Aktiengesellschaft provides catering services in Austria, Turkey, Great Britain, the United States, Spain, Germany, and internationally. It operates through three divisions: Airline Catering; International Event Catering; and Restaurants, Lounges & Hotel. The company offers airline catering services; and event catering, infrastructure, and planning services. The company also engages in the operation of lounges, retail stores, airport catering, restaurants and Demel café, hotels, and staff restaurants. It operates restaurants and cafes under the DO & CO, Hédiard, HENRY, AIOLI, and Demel brands. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Vienna, Austria.

stocks.name: Dofer Yapi Malzemeleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Dofer Yapi Malzemeleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells iron, steel mesh, and reinforcing bar products in Turkey. It offers cold drawing rods and pipe ducts, as well as prefabricated, reinforced concrete structure, and concrete transformer substation mesh products. Dofer Yapi Malzemeleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: Dogusan Boru Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Dogusan Boru Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S. engages in the commercial and industrial activities related to Roman-type perlite concrete tiles and perlite floor tiles in Turkey. It sells tiles, pallets, and pipes made of perlite. The company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Erzincan, Turkey.

stocks.name: Döktas Dökümcülük Ticaret ve Sanayi A.S.
stocks.description: Döktas Dökümcülük Ticaret ve Sanayi A.S. manufactures and sells cast iron, ductile iron, and aluminum castings and wheels for the automotive, heavy commercial vehicle, agriculture, construction, mining, and machinery manufacturing sectors. It operates through three segments: Pikdöküm, Aluminum Casting, and Rim. The Pikdöküm segment produces gray and ductile iron castings. The Aluminum Casting segment manufactures aluminum casting components. The Rim segment produces aluminum wheels. The company also exports its products. It serves the automotive, heavy commercial vehicles, construction, and agricultural machinery industries. The company was formerly known as Componenta Dökümcülük Ticaret ve Sanayi A.S. and changed its name to Döktas Dökümcülük Ticaret ve Sanayi A.S. in April 2018. The company was incorporated in 1973 and is based in Bursa, Turkey. Döktas Dökümcülük Ticaret ve Sanayi A.S. is a subsidiary of Çelik Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Duran Dogan Basim ve Ambalaj Sanayi A.S.
stocks.description: Duran Dogan Basim ve Ambalaj Sanayi A.S., together with its subsidiaries, provides packaging products in Turkey. The company offers paper, cardboard, and various plastic materials in rolls and sheets to produce various packaging, printing, chiseling, cutting, gluing, and laminating works on aluminum, metal, tin, etc. It offers packaging products for food, boutique, medical, home and personal care, and boutique sectors. Duran Dogan Basim ve Ambalaj Sanayi A.S. was founded in 1934 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: DYO Boya Fabrikalari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: DYO Boya Fabrikalari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells paints, varnishes, resins, other surface coatings, and construction and thermal insulation products in Türkiye and internationally. The company offers industrial, furniture, and marine coatings; protective, coil, and defence and military coatings; and car refinish and polyester. It also provides decorative paints, including interior wall paints, exterior wall paints, wood and metal paints, and wood care products and varnishes, as well as primers, putties and thinners; products under the Dr. DYO and DYO traffic brands; and colors, painters, architect products. The company was founded in 1927 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. DYO Boya Fabrikalari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Yasar Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Deniz Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.address: Maslak Mahallesi Eski Büyükdere Caddesi No:27
stocks.description: Deniz Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. operates as a real estate investment trust in Turkey. The company engages in real estate investment and development activities. Its property portfolio consists of residential units, hotels, and commercial units in Istanbul, Ankara, and Mugla. The company qualifies as a real estate investment trust for federal income tax purposes. It generally would not be subject to federal corporate income taxes if it distributes at least 90% of its taxable income to its stockholders. The company was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Deniz Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is a subsidiary of Denizbank Anonim Sirketi.

stocks.name: EIS Eczacibasi Ilaç, Sinai ve Finansal Yatirimlar Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: EIS Eczacibasi Ilaç, Sinai ve Finansal Yatirimlar Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., together with subsidiaries, engages in health and real estate development businesses in Turkey and internationally. The Health segment is involved in the production, marketing, and sale of medicines related to human health and veterinary medicines. The Real Estate Development segment engages in development of real estate properties; rental activities for serum facilities; and providing consulting services on land development and project management. The company was incorporated in 1951 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. EIS Eczacibasi Ilaç, Sinai ve Finansal Yatirimlar Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Eczacibasi Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Eczacibasi Yatirim Holding Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Eczacibasi Yatirim Holding Ortakligi A.S., an investment holding company, markets and sells construction products in Turkey. The company distributes ceramic sanitary ware, armatures, bathtubs, shower trays, concealed reservoirs, bathroom furniture, ceramic coating products, construction chemicals, kitchen furniture, counters and accessories, kitchen appliances, small household appliances, and tiles under the VitrA Bathroom, VitrA Karo, Artema, Villeroy & Boch, Intema, Norm, Selena, and Punto brands through its dealer networks and retail stores. It offers guiding and informative presentation, exhibition, consultancy, sales, and after-sales services. In addition, the company engages in real estate development; reference and generic pharmaceutical, nuclear medicine, real estate, and ceramic coating markets; leasing offices and shopping centers; and general investment activities. The company was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Eczacibasi Yatirim Holding Ortakligi A.S. is a subsidiary of Eczacibasi Holding A.S.

stocks.name: E-Data Teknoloji Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: E-Data Teknoloji Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi engages in the distribution of technology products and solutions to institutions and organizations in Turkey. The company offers network products, printing solutions, cyber security products, server-storage products, data center infrastructure products, and other hardware and software solutions, as well as endpoint and data security solutions. It also provides technical consultancy, installation, and other pre- and post-sales services. The company offers its solutions to telecommunication, finance, insurance, manufacturing, health, education, entertainment, and other industries, as well as in SMB market. E-Data Teknoloji Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: Edip Gayrimenkul Yatirim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.address: Mahmutbey Merkez Mah. Tasocagi Cad. No:5
stocks.description: Edip Gayrimenkul Yatirim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. engages in the construction, trade, purchase-sale, renting, and letting of real estate in Turkey. It is involved in the shopping malls, offices, residences, and business centers activities; construction, establishment, and organization services, as well as marketing, operation, leasing, and renting of commercial warehouses, commercial parks, and similar places. The company was formerly known as Edip Iplik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Edip Gayrimenkul Yatirim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. in June 2009. Edip Gayrimenkul Yatirim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1971 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Ege Endüstri ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Ege Endüstri ve Ticaret A.S., together with its subsidiaries, develops and manufactures axles and suspension system components in Turkey and internationally. It offers fabricated and e-axle housings, air bellow beams, cast axles machining, and independent front suspension, as well as trailer, pusher, drive, front, and self steering and steerable tag axles. The company's products are used in commercial and special vehicle applications. It exports its products. The company was incorporated in 1964 and is based in Izmir, Turkey. Ege Endüstri ve Ticaret A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Bayraktar Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Nasmed Özel Saglik Hizmetleri Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Nasmed Özel Saglik Hizmetleri Ticaret Anonim Sirketi provides outpatient and inpatient examination, diagnosis, and treatment services to patients in Turkey. The company constructs, renovates, establishes, purchases, and operates diagnostic and treatment facilities, laboratories, blood banks, rehabilitation centers, and other health-related institutions; and provides all health services, including preventive medicine. It operates hospitals for emergency and emergency medical services, anesthesiology and reanimation, nutrition and dietetics, neurosurgery, pediatrics, dermatology, infectious diseases and clinical microbiology, aesthetics, plastic and reconstructive surgery, physical therapy and rehabilitation, gastroenterology, general surgery, interventional radiology, pulmonology, ophthalmology, internal medicine, obstetrics and gynecology, cardiovascular surgery, clinical biochemistry, neurology, orthopedics and traumatology, palliative care, psychiatry, psychology, radiology, urology, intensive care adult, intensive care coronary, intensive care cardiovascular surgery, and intensive care neonatal, as well as various otolaryngology diseases, such as ear, nose, and throat. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Ege Gübre Sanayii A.S.
stocks.address: Ege Perla B Kule Çinarli Mah. Ozan Abay Cad. No:10
stocks.description: Ege Gübre Sanayii A.S. primarily provides port services. The company operates through Chemical Fertilizers and Port Services segments. It offers port services, including container handling, storage, container stuffing/unloading, container repair/cleaning, yard stacking, and OFFDOCK services; loading and terminal services; terminal management services; and insurance brokerage services. The company also provides compound, supply, and specialized fertilizers, as well as organic solvents. Ege Gübre Sanayii A.S. was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Ege Profil Ticaret ve Sanayi Anonim Sirketi
stocks.address: Menemen Plastik Ihtisas Organize Sanayi Bölgesi
stocks.description: Ege Profil Ticaret ve Sanayi Anonim Sirketi produces and sells plastic pipes, spare parts, and various profiles and plastic items in Turkey and internationally. The company offers windows under the Egepen Deceuninck brand; PVC window, door, and blind systems under the Winsa brand; PVC pipes and window systems under the Pimapen brand; recyclable products under the MAESTRO brand; and other products under the DWT and STORBOX brands. It also provides frontal systems, opening systems, grills, sunshades, and skylight systems under the IQ Aluminum brand; and glass balcony systems under the CAMODA brand. The company serves the construction industry. It exports its products to Europe, America, Asia, Africa, and Australia. The company was incorporated in 1981 and is based in Izmir, Turkey. Ege Profil Ticaret ve Sanayi Anonim Sirketi operates as a subsidiary of Deceuninck NV.

stocks.name: Ege Seramik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Ege Seramik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells floor and wall tiles in Turkey and internationally. The company also offers glazed porcelain, floor, wall, and color body products. Its products are used in bathroom wall and floor, kitchen countertop and floor, corridor, and decorative; garden/terrace floor and front wall; and facede, floor, industrial, and pool areas. The company was incorporated in 1972 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. Ege Seramik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Ibrahim Polat Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Ekiz Kimya Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Ekiz Kimya Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi provides olive oil products in Turkey. The company offers extra virgin, natural first, organic extra virgin, refined, and riviera olive oil products. It sells its products under the Weighing, Belluti, Healthy You, Dona Elena, and Ekiz Chemistry brand names. The company was formerly known as Ekiz Yag ve Sabun Sanayii A.S. and changed its name to Ekiz Kimya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. in September 2014. Ekiz Kimya Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: EKOS TEKNOLOJI
stocks.description: Ekos Teknoloji ve Elektrik Anonim Sirketi operates as a technology and service provider company for electrical infrastructure in Turkey and internationally. The company provides medium-voltage switchgears, compact transformer substations, control and automation panels, mobile transformer substations, NTP/PTP time servers, and EKOS mobility solutions, as well as transformer preventive maintenance sensors and software, automation products, medium voltage capacitors, gas-insulated switching products (GIS) up to 20Kv. It also resells products of energy sector. It serves power producers, network operators, and industrial and commercial consumers. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Balikesir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Eksun Gida Tarim Sanayi Ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Eksun Gida Tarim Sanayi Ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi manufactures, buys, sells, imports, exports, and transits flour and flour products in Türkiye and internationally. It offers additives, enalt muesli, mixes, complete mixes, premixes, and starch. The company also provides pastry products, bread mixes, gluten-free flour mixes, semolina, and rye. It exports its products to Middle East, Africa, and Latin America. The company was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Eksun Gida Tarim Sanayi Ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi operates as a subsidiary of Eksim Yatirim Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Elite Naturel Organik Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Elite Naturel Organik Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells organic fruit and vegetable juices in Turkey and internationally. The company also provides pulps and concentrates; semi-finished and finished products of organic fruits, vegetables, and other food products; and carbonated, non-carbonated, and non-alcoholic beverages. It exports its products to approximately 30 countries. Elite Naturel Organik Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1975 and is based in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: Emek Elektrik Endustrisi Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Emek Elektrik Endustrisi Anonim Sirketi engages in the production, testing, marketing, and sale of transformers, capacitors, disconnectors, separators, and electromechanical equipment in Turkey and internationally. It offers oil and epoxy resin current and voltage transformers. The company was incorporated in 1969 and is based in Ankara, Turkey. Emek Elektrik Endustrisi Anonim Sirketi operates as a subsidiary of Emek Elektrik USA Inc.

stocks.name: Eminis Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Eminis Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. engages in the manufacture and sale of plastic and metal packaging products in Turkey and internationally. The company offers plastic products, including bucket, heavy bucket, performance bucket, light bucket, and can products; and can, spout cap, monoblock, drum, putty can, diameter box, bucket, and bottom ring metal products. Its products are used in paint and chemical, mineral oil, construction chemicals, pool chemicals, confectionery, marmalade and chocolate, powder beverage, and cosmetics industries. Eminis Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1970 and is based in Dilovasi, Turkey.

stocks.name: Enerya Enerji Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Enerya Enerji Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the wholesale and retail distribution of natural gas in Turkey. The company also offers operational and consultancy services, as well as engages in precious metal mining. It serves residential and industrial customers. Enerya Enerji Anonim Sirketi was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Enerya Enerji Anonim Sirketi is a subsidiary of Ahlatci Dogal Gaz Dagitim Enerji ve Yatirim A.S.

stocks.name: Ensari Sinai Yatirimlar Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Ensari Sinai Yatirimlar Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells leather products in Turkey. The company offers merino, merinillo, lacoon, toscana, rassado, tigrado, French, and domestic UK products. It also produces, sells, imports, and exports raw materials, products, machinery, and facilities related to the flour industry; and provides paper and cardboard, PVC, cellophane, polyethylene, polypropylene, plastic materials, aluminum, metal, and tinplate, etc., as well as offers printing, chiseling, gluing, and laminating services. In addition, the company generates electricity through renewable energy sources such as electricity, rental of electrical energy production and facilities. The company was formerly known as Ensari Deri Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. and change its name to Ensari Sinai Yatirimlar Anonim Sirketi in June 2025. Ensari Sinai Yatirimlar Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Egeplast Ege Plastik Ticaret ve Sanayi Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Egeplast Ege Plastik Ticaret ve Sanayi Anonim Sirketi manufactures and sells plastic pipes, fittings, and spare parts in Turkey. The company offers building group systems, which include wastewater pipes and fittings, PPRC plumbing pipes and fittings, PVC roof gutters and rain downpipes, and heating system pipes and fittings; and infrastructure group systems, such as PVC-U pressure pipe systems, sewer pipes and fittings, Aegean corrugated pipes, polyethylene pipes and fittings, natural gas pipes and fittings, drainage pipes and fittings, and HDPE corrugated and PE telecommunication systems. It also provides sprinkler irrigation systems and drip irrigation systems. Its products are used in buildings, clean water distribution, sewerage, telecommunications, natural gas, drainage, infrastructure, and similar sectors. Egeplast Ege Plastik Ticaret ve Sanayi Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 1973 and is based in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Erbosan Erciyas Boru Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Erbosan Erciyas Boru Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells carbon steel tubes and pipes in Turkey.
