It offers welded steel black and galvanized water and gas pipes for use in building heating, mechanical installations, and plumbing and ventilation systems; gas and line pipes used in LPG installation, and boiler tubes for drilling lines, as well as natural gas, petroleum, and gas line projects; and sprinkler pipes that are used for sprinkler systems and fire protection. The company also provides industrial tubes and hollow sections for use in automotive, home appliances, furniture, greenhouse, construction, and transportation industries, as well as fence, industry and building, textile, and solar energy systems. In addition, it offers square, rectangular hollow sections and low-pressure boiler and steam pipes. Erbosan Erciyas Boru Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1974 and is headquartered in Kayseri, Turkey.

stocks.name: Erciyas Çelik Boru Sanayi A.S.

It is also involved in the creation of operating systems; online environments for exercising; real-time case consultation applications for general practitioners; development of technology on liposomes; data analytics, scouting, and team management platforms; beauty and care products; protection and control of sensitive data; SaaS data analytics tools; a library of digital twins of building materials; medical devices to treat glaucoma and neurological disorders; marketplaces for digital advertising, marketing, and software projects, as well as for after-sales services; online platforms for secure counseling services; and mobile quiz applications. In addition, the company engages in the management of communication channels; solutions that digitize and optimize shift work personnel management processes; research and development on malware; social platforms to practice English; online psychological support platforms; wireless sensors and industrial IoT technology; payment processing; nickel-based cathodes; online software to invoice orders; digital beauty assistants; UX/UI, mobile/web application, API, service, and cloud and integration technology development services; mobile applications to order water; solar-based renewable energy; and complete passive network infrastructure products. Escort Teknoloji Yatirim A.S. was founded in 1991 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Esenboga Elektrik Üretim A.S.

It also provides operation and maintenance solutions; and project development and turnkey engineering, procurement and installation for solar energy projects. Esenboga Elektrik Üretim A.S. was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey. Esenboga Elektrik Üretim A.S. is a subsidiary of Naturel Yenilenebilir Enerji Ticaret A.S.

stocks.name: ETILER GIDA

The company was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Euro Trend Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.

stocks.name: Euro Kapital Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi

stocks.name: Europower Enerji ve Otomasyon Teknolojileri Sanayi Ticaret Anonim Sirketi

Further, it undertakes electrical and electromechanical EPC projects in Turkey and internationally. stocks.name: Europen Endustri Insaat Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.

stocks.name: Fenerbahçe Futbol A.S.

In addition, the company offers business continuity, disaster recovery, and backup; CCTV systems; virtualization and consolidation solutions; data storage systems; server system solutions; infrastructure solutions; data center solutions; cyber security solutions; and enterprise network solutions. The company serves the defense, energy, manufacturing sectors; and public institutions. stocks.name: Frigo-Pak Gida Maddeleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.

stocks.name: Gediz Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.

stocks.name: Gentas Dekoratif Yuzeyler Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.

stocks.name: Gelecek Varlik Yönetimi Anonim Sirketi

Additionally, the company is involved in tourism and travel agency operations; insurance agency; natural gas and petroleum product transportation; ship management; and port, real estate, tourism, financial, and technology investment businesses. Göknur Gida Maddeleri Enerji Imalat Ithalat Ihracat Ticaret ve Sanayi Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

It also provides raw materials and semi-finished products, including gypsum, trass, limestone, marn, iron ore, and bauxite; and Portland cement clinker, as well as SR 5 clinker products. stocks.name: Gozde Girisim Sermayesi Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.

It focuses its investment in finance, information and communication technology, retail, renewable energy, real estate, logistics, and agriculture. The firm typically holds controlling or significant minority interests in companies in Turkey. It seeks to act as lead equity investor in strategic minority equity investments. The firm seeks to hold its investment for five to seven years. Gozde Girisim Sermayesi Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. was founded in January 2010 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey with an additional office in Istanbul, Turkey.

The company was founded in July 9, 1996 and is based in Sariyer, Turkey. Garanti Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Garanti Yatirim Menkul Kiymetler Anonim Sirketi.

The firm seeks to invest in companies based in Turkey, and in international markets. It typically invests between TRY 10 million ($0.31 million) and TRY 40 million ($1.24 million) per project. The firm may seek co-investor for higher investments and takes both minority and majority stakes in its portfolio companies. The firm's investments through equity investment, convertible debt, or structured debt-equity mix, are generally made by means of growth capital or project-based restructuring transactions. It typically invests in equity or convertible bonds and exits its investments between three years and seven years through an initial public offering, strategic sale, or sale back to the original shareholders. Is Girisim Sermayesi Yatirim Ortakligi AS was founded in 2000 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Is Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Is Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is a Turkey-based real estate investment trust through the consolidation of Is Gayrimenkul Yatirim ve Proje Degerlendirme A.S. and Merkez Gayrimenkul Yatirim ve Proje Degerlendirme A.S. The company is a subsidiary of Turkiye Is Bankasi A.S. and operates under the regulations of the Capital Markets Board of Turkey applicable to real estate investment corporations. Its principal activities include investing in income-generating real estate assets, real estate development projects, and property-related capital market instruments in line with regulatory portfolio limits. The company's shares have been listed on Borsa Istanbul since 1999, and its registered headquarters are in Istanbul. Turkey.Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. was incorporated in August 6th, 1999 in Turkey.

stocks.name: Isik Plastik Sanayi ve Dis Ticaret Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Isik Plastik Sanayi ve Dis Ticaret Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi manufactures and sells plastic products in Turkey and internationally. It provides disposable containers, food packaging, industrial plates, compounds, and masterbatches from plastic raw materials. The company also solid polycarbonate and acrylic sheets, pet-G sheets, multiwall sheets, noise barriers, non-glare sheets, flame retardant sheets, and accessories; and drinking cups, plates, yogurt and ayran cups, deli pots, and lids. Isik Plastik Sanayi ve Dis Ticaret Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 1988 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Türkiye Is Bankasi A.S.
stocks.description: Türkiye Is Bankasi A.S., together with its subsidiaries, provides various banking products and services to individuals and businesses in Turkey. It operates through Corporate/Commercial Banking; Retail/Private Banking; Treasury Operations and Investment Activities; Insurance and Reinsurance Activities; and Other segments. The company offers personal loans comprising land, education, overdraft, and yacht loans; car and home loans; credit and debit cards; deposit and investment products, such as term deposits, term TL, term FX, term gold, non-term deposits, gold, equities, futures and options markets, mutual funds, Eurobonds, and debt instruments; digital banking; compulsory earthquake, motor vehicle compulsory third party liability, comprehensive motor, health, personal accident, workplace, life, critical illness, credit card payment protecting, and loan payment protection insurance products; pension funds; and expat, private, and startup banking services. It also provides cash and non-cash loans; letters of guarantee and credit; agricultural banking; and foreign trade transactions, trading, and financing services. In addition, the company offers project financing, working capital and investment loans, cash management, checks and promissory notes, bill collection, payroll payments, investment accounts, tax collection, and other banking products; overdraft accounts, money transfer, and safe deposit boxes; individual retirement plans, life and non-life insurance services, and reinsurance services; securities trading, spot and forward trading, syndication, and securitization services; derivative transactions, such as forwards, swaps, futures and options; brokerage, venture capital, and real estate investment trust services; investment banking; and financial leasing, factoring, asset management, portfolio management, and payment services. Türkiye Is Bankasi A.S. was founded in 1924 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Isbir Sentetik Dokuma Sanayi A.S.
stocks.description: Isbir Sentetik Dokuma Sanayi A.S. operates in the industrial packaging and technical textile sectors in Turkey, Europe, the United States, and internationally. It offers big bags, carpet backing, big bag fabrics, PE films, compound fillers, additive masterbatches, and masks. The company is also involved in trade, import, and export of FIBC (fiberglass refrigerant), bulk bags, and carpet backing. It serves food, pharmaceutical, chemical, and mining industries. The company was incorporated in 1968 and is headquartered in Balikesir, Turkey. Isbir Sentetik Dokuma Sanayi A.S. is a subsidiary of Isbir Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Is Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Is Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. engages in portfolio management business in Turkey. It invests in capital market instruments, such as equities, fixed income securities, gold, and other precious metals. The company was formerly known as Is B Tipi Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi and changed its name to Is Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. in April 2014. The company was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey

stocks.name: IZDEMIR Enerji Elektrik Uretim A.S.
stocks.description: IZDEMIR Enerji Elektrik Uretim A.S. produces and sells electricity through coal. It is also involved in the iron-steel and port and power plant, solar energy plant businesses. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. IZDEMIR Enerji Elektrik Uretim A.S. is a subsidiary of Izmir Demir Çelik Sanayi Anonim Sirketi.

stocks.name: Izmir Firça Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Izmir Firça Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi produces and sells various cleaning materials and painting brushes in Turkey and internationally. It offers brushes, such as white wash, paint, and oil based paint brushes; steel, including spatula, trowel and putty knifes, and stuff scratch brush; min size, big, and special rollers; tapes, drop sheets and nylon canvas, and auxiliary products; and cleaning products comprising window and floor squeegee, brush, broom, mop, handle, and bucket, as well as hobby, directing, hardware, and thinner products. The company also provides bristles, nylon, paint and water, cleaning, wooden, sink, bottle, and floor brushes and similar products; and roller types, tile comb, paint mixer, roller sieve, ladder, tarpaulin, tape, glass cleaner, floor wiper, pole, cleaning cloth, bucket, etc., as well as engages in construction and tourism services. Izmir Firça Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Iz Yatirim Holding A.S.
stocks.description: Iz Yatirim Holding A.S. engages in the agriculture and animal husbandry activities in Turkey. It is also involved in the development, building, owning, and operating geothermal and recovered energy-based (REG) power plants; produces and publishes hypercasual, arcade idle, and hybrid mobile games; and offers Pocket eSIM. In addition, the company invests in technologies, disruptive chemical technologies, and automotive; and engages in renewable and clean energy activities. The company was formerly known as Iz Hayvancilik Tarim ve Gida Sanayi Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Iz Yatirim Holding A.S. in April 2022. Iz Yatirim Holding A.S. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Izmir Demir Çelik Sanayi Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Izmir Demir Çelik Sanayi Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production, marketing, and sale of iron and steel in Turkey and internationally. It operates through three segments: Iron and Steel Operations; Port Operations; and Energy Operations. It is also involved in energy production and trading, and provision of transportation and port management services. The company was incorporated in 1975 and is based in Izmir, Turkey. Izmir Demir Çelik Sanayi Anonim Sirketi is a subsidiary of Sahin Koc Celik Sanayi A.S.

stocks.name: Jantsa Jant Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Jantsa Jant Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells wheels for commercial, agricultural, industrial, and military applications in Turkey, Europe, the United States, Canada, and internationally. The company offers agricultural and multi-purpose wheels for tractors, implements, trailers, forestry, harvesters, sprayers, and row-cop; industrial wheels for construction, material handling, earthmoving, and mining; commercial wheels for trucks, buses, and trailers; and military wheels. It also provides light commercial type and agricultural type rims, heavy duty rims, rim lock ring profile, rim ring profile, hydraulic press, and various mold production. The company was incorporated in 1977 and is headquartered in Aydin, Turkey.

stocks.name: Kaplamin Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Kaplamin Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells expanded polystyrene, paper lamination, and packaging materials in Turkey. The company offers food packaging, durable packaging, chemical and cleaning packages, automotive packaging, heavy duty packaging, ceramic tiles and sanitaryware packaging, YSM packaging, and paper bag products. It serves food and agriculture, fresh fruits, vegetables, fats and oils, meat, fish, eggs, beverages, beverages, chemical products, consumer goods, textiles and apparel, and ceramics industries. The company was incorporated in 1975 and is based in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Karel Elektronik Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Karel Elektronik Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. designs, develops, produces, and sells communication systems in Türkiye. It offers communication products, such as PBX phone systems for small, medium, and large-scale businesses; IP based call center systems for public and private institutions; and IP, analog, wall, hotel, and feature phones, as well as direct station select modules, and operator phone headsets. The company also provides convergence and integration products, including conference products, GSM terminals, wireless (DECT) systems, auto-attendant and voicemail modules, call traffic control systems, VoIP and network products, call recording systems, nurse call systems, and other products, as well as vehicle tracking systems. In addition, it offers visual communication and security systems comprising security cameras, intruder alarm, and intercoms; cloud solutions with Internet applications that facilitate the business processes and provide economy and productivity for corporate users; and electronics manufacturing services, as well as undertakes telecommunication projects for fixed and mobile operators, and state institutions and organizations. Further, the company offers defense industry solutions, such as military tactical switches; alarm and announcement system for small boats and navy ships, phone and intercom PABX system, military gateway, and communications switching systems; electronic mirror; military computers; and inertial navigation systems. It provides its communication solutions for shopping malls, public institutions, medical institutions, educational institutions, production facilities, retail business, finance institutions, and transportation institutions. The company also exports its products and technologies to approximately 30 countries. Karel Elektronik Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1986 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Kartonsan Karton Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.address: Prof. Dr. Bülent Tarcan Caddesi No: 5
stocks.description: Kartonsan Karton Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and trades in coated cardboards in Turkey and internationally. It provides normprint, exprint, and luxtriplex multi-coated cardboards from recycled paper. The company's products are used in the food, pharmaceuticals, cosmetics, advertising and promotion sectors. Kartonsan Karton Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1967 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Katmerciler Arac Üstü Ekipman Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.address: Sokak No:10 A. O. S. B.
stocks.description: Katmerciler Arac Üstü Ekipman Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells various vehicles in Turkey. The company offers hydraulic ladder fire trucks, aerial ladder platforms, fire fighting with portable ladder fire trucks, narrow field fire trucks, forestry fire trucks, remote controlled foam tower, and rapid intervention vehicles; and garbage trucks and semi-trailers, skip loaders, mini tipper garbage vehicles, refuse container washing and disinfecting vehicles, waste compactor, combined canal suction and jetting vehicles, septic tank trucks and septic tank truck trailers, road sweepers, and hook, hydro lifts. It also provides water tankers and water tanker trailers, bulk trailers, fuel tankers and trailers, tippers and tipper trailers, and low bed and cargo trailers; recovery trucks; articulated, telescopic, and sliding platforms; ambulances; mobile medical clinic trucks; chlorination vehicle; mobile workshops; cargo body with cranes; snow ploughs and salt spreader; and aircraft refuellers and fuel hydrant dispensers. In addition, the company offers mine resistant ambush protected, armoured border security vehicles, personnel carriers, ambulances, armored command and patrol vehicles, backhoe loaders, ADR fuel tankers, water tankers, tippers, and telescopic forklifts, as well as tactical urban warfare vehicle, criminal investigation vehicles, riot control vehicles, remote controlled armoured tracked excavator, remote controlled weapon platform with tracking system, remote controlled armoured articulated wheel loaders, remote controlled armoured bulldozers, tank and troop carrier and rescuer lowbed tailer, and cargo body. Further, it provides cranes, silo trailers, and truck mixers; and after sale services. The company also exports its products. Katmerciler Arac Üstü Ekipman Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1985 and is based in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Kayseri Seker Fabrikasi Anonim Sirketi

It is involved in the production of crystal sugar from beet under the Kayseri Seker brand name. The company was incorporated in 1955 and is based in Kayseri, Turkey.

stocks.name: KUZEY BORU

Additionally, it provides logistics, engineering services, after-sales services, accredited laboratory services, and project specific production. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Aksaray, Turkey.

stocks.name: Kocaer Celik Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi

The company also provides rasp bars, steel profiles for solar mounting and tracking systems, and underground fortification systems; and window sections. In addition, it is involved in domestic and international logistics activities; production of electricity and steam energy; and foreign trade services. The company serves structural steel, solar energy infrastructure, energy transmission line, mining, tunneling, transportation, machinery manufacturing, agriculture, shipbuilding, and defense industries. Kocaer Celik Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 1984 and is based in Denizli, Turkey.

stocks.name: Kent Gida Maddeleri Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S.

The company also trades in chocolate. It sells chocolates under the 5 Star, Alpen Gold, Cadbury, Cadbury Dairy Milk, Côte d'Or, Daim, Freia, Hu, Lacta, Marabou, Milka, and Toblerone brand name; biscuits under Barni, belVita, Chips Ahoy, Club Social, Enjoy Life Foods, Honey Maid, Kinh Do, LU, Oreo, Prince, Ritz, Tate's Bake Shop, Tiger, Triscuit, TUC, and Wheat Thins brand name; and baked snacks under 7Days, CLIF, and Perfect Snacks brand names. The company also markets beverages under Bournvita and Tang brand; gum and candy under Clorets, Halls, Maynards Bassetts, Sour Patch Kids, and Stride brand; and meals under Philadelphia and royal brand. The company was founded in 1927 and is headquartered in Gebze, Turkey. Kent Gida Maddeleri Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Cadbury Schweppes Overseas Ltd.

stocks.name: Kervansaray Yatirim Holding A.S.

It also involves in renting out hotels in Turkey. Kervansaray Yatirim Holding A.S. was formerly known as Ceylan Yatirim Holding AS and changed its name to Kervansaray Yatirim Holding A.S. in 2013. The company was incorporated in 1976 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Kafein Yazilim Hizmetleri Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Kafein Yazilim Hizmetleri Ticaret A.S. provides various software and technology management solutions, services, and products in Turkey and internationally. The company offers Data Focus, an advanced and integrated data governance tool that allows you to effectively manage your enterprise-structured data; Data Touch, a tool that enables users with a diverse array of analytical capabilities, and enabling more informed data-driven decisions; Test Data Management software; DataSkope, a database activity monitoring and prevention product; Infraskope, a log management and SIEM solution; ApiFort, a domestic cybersecurity product; Corporate Portal to facilitate intra-corporate processes and lighten the load of the teams in charge of these processes; ERPGuard, a solution designed to enhance the security of SAP systems and optimize compliance processes; and MWGuard mobile app shielding system. It also provides turnkey projects, cyber security solutions, google security operations, cloud solutions, data virtualization consulting, robotic process automation service, data privacy and protection services, outsourcing services, data decision management systems consultancy, test management consultancy, digital transformation consultancy, data warehouse consulting, managed technology services, software development, advanced analytics solutions, and IT operation management services. It serves to the technology, banking, telecommunications, tourism, services, retail, and insurance sectors. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Koray Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.

The company's investment portfolio of properties consists of residential and commercial real estate. It is also involved in the project development activities. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Ersan Alisveris Hizmetleri ve Gida Sanayi Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Ersan Alisveris Hizmetleri ve Gida Sanayi Ticaret A.S. operates a chain of supermarkets and hypermarkets under the KIM brand in Turkey. The company also offers cleaning products comprising toilet paper, paper towels, concentrated fabric softeners, bleach, liquid dish detergents, dish lemons, glass cleaners, liquid soap, softener, and surface cleaners; and wheat for ashure, kidney bean, sweet corn, bean, rice, lentil, bulgur wheat, chickpeas, and granulated sugar under the under the KIMI brand. In addition, it engages in import and export activities. Ersan Alisveris Hizmetleri ve Gida Sanayi Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Kiler Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Kiler Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. operates as a real estate investment trust in Turkey. The company engages in the development of residential and commercial real estate projects. It also provides property management services. The company was formerly known as Biskon Yapi A.S. and changed its name to Kiler Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. in February 2008. Kiler Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. was founded in 1994 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Kalekim Kimyevi Maddeler Sanayi Ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi

It operates through the Construction Chemicals; and Concrete, Cement Chemicals, and Raw Materials segments. Its product portfolio includes waterproofing products, such as cement -based, acrylic-based, bitumen-based, polyurethane-based, and membrane-based waterproofing products, as well as impregnated primers and waterproofing bands; tile adhesives, including cement, acrylic, and resin-based adhesives, as well as cement, epoxy, and resin-based grouts; and surface cleaning and maintenance products, sealants, and tile levelling systems. It also provides cement and epoxy-based repair mortars, cement and epoxy-based grout mortars, primers and additives, and cement-based smoothing screeds for technical applications; primers and coverings, industrial coverings, cement-based hardeners, surface hardeners, and curing materials for floor applications; decorative products, interior paints, exterior paints and plasters, surface preparation materials, and coloring systems for paints and decorative applications; and system components, adhesives and plasters, decorative coatings, and complementary accessories for thermal insulation applications. In addition, it offers bathroom, kitchen, pool, balcony and terrace, basement and foundation, floor, interior, and facade solutions; and assembly and sealing products. The company was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Kalekim Kimyevi Maddeler Sanayi Ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi operates as a subsidiary of H. Ibrahim Bodur Holding Anonim Sirketi.

stocks.name: Klimasan Klima Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.

The company offers beverage coolers, such as counter tops; back bars; single, double, and triple door; horizontal, and sub zero coolers; supermarket cabinets and wine coolers; and freezers, including chest, vertical, and ice cream and frozen food freezers under the Metalfrio, Klimasan, and Senocak brands. It serves beverage, ice cream, and food service/retail sector. Klimasan Klima Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1915 and is based in Manisa, Turkey.

stocks.name: Türkiye Kalkinma ve Yatirim Bankasi A.S.

The company provides financial solutions and banking services to medium and large-scale joint stock company customers, investment loans, project financing, TL and foreign currency-based business loans, letters of credit, and guarantees and collateral. It also offers treasury and government bonds, repo transactions, capital markets consultancy, transactions, money swaps and forward foreign exchange transactions, capital markets consultancy, financial consultancy, and mergers and acquisition consultancy services. Additionally, the company provides project funding and corporate loans and development funds. Türkiye Kalkinma ve Yatirim Bankasi A.S. was incorporated in 1975 and is based in Ümraniye, Turkey.

stocks.name: Kiler Holding Anonim Sirketi

The company plans, develops, and realizes the projects; and carries out infrastructure and superstructure contracting projects. It is also involved in the retail sale and wholesale of electrical energy directly to the consumers; provision of personnel transportation services to corporate customers; and open-end and ring-yarn production. In addition, the company packs and distributes sugar products, such as crystal granulated sugar, cube sugar, pulps, and molasses. Kiler Holding Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1983 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Kaleseramik Canakkale Kalebodur Seramik Sanayi A.S.

The company was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Kaleseramik Canakkale Kalebodur Seramik Sanayi A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Canakkale Seramik Fabrikalari A.S.

stocks.name: Koleksiyon Mobilya Sanayi A.S.

It also provides desks and benches, executive and meeting tables, seminar tables, home and office, dining and cafeteria, and coffee tables; storage products, such as bookcase and TV units, cabinet and credenzas, and pedestals; nightstands and dressers, and beds; dividers; and outdoor products. Koleksiyon Mobilya Sanayi A.S. was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Kimteks Poliüretan Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.address: Inkilap Mah. Dr. Adnan Büyükdeniz Cad. No:13

It offers polyurethane raw material for unit sole, slipper system, safety shoe sole, polyurethane boot, insole, polyester polyol, and polymeric polyester polyol systems, as well as release agents, and liquid color master batch systems. The company also provides polyurethane raw material  for sandwich, pipe insulation, spray foam, polyurea systems, polyurethane rubber binder system, and shutter and sectional doors polyurethane systems; elastomers; release agents; polyester polyols; integral foam, filter, foam, and sound insulation systems; and office furniture foam, wood imitation, viscoelastic, integral foam, polyester polyol systems for flame laminations. In addition, it offers commercial and domestic refrigerator systems, cold storage room refrigerator container systems, and boiler and solar panel systems; EVA compounds, thermoplastic polyurethane, polyurethane gels, and stress ball systems; and polyols for rigid polyurethane, and foam and CASE Applications. Kimteks Poliüretan Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Konfrut Tarim A.S.

It engages in cultivation, harvesting, storage, packaging, wholesale and retail trade, import, and export of all kinds of legumes, grains, and fruits and vegetables, including strawberry, beet, apple, carrot, pomegranate, watermelon, orange, pear, mandarin, quince, tomatoes, and lemon. The company also provides logistics solutions for agricultural products. Konfrut Tarim A.S. was formerly known as Konfrut Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Konfrut Tarim A.S. in January 2025. Konfrut Tarim A.S. was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Konfrut Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Dohler Gida Sanayi Anonim Sirketi.

stocks.name: KOC METALURJI

It produces scrap metal. The company was formerly known as Koç Haddecilik Tekstil Insaat Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Koç Metalürji Anonim Sirketi in June 2016. Koç Metalürji Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1993 and is based in Payas, Turkey.

stocks.name: Konya Çimento Sanayii Anonim Sirketi

The company was founded in 1954 and is based in Konya, Turkey. Konya Çimento Sanayii Anonim Sirketi is a subsidiary of Parficim S.A.S.

stocks.name: Kontrolmatik Teknoloji Enerji Ve Muhendislik Anonim Sirketi

It serves power generation, transmission and distribution facilities, oil and natural gas, transportation, food and beverage, mining, agriculture and fertilizer, power plant subsidiaries, operational technologies, industrial software, control and security systems, communication, data processing, internet of things, power systems, and turnkey solution sectors, as well as other industrial facilities, such as cement, paper, iron-steel, and chemistry. The company was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Koza Polyester Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi

stocks.name: Kordsa Teknik Tekstil A.S.

It is involved in the manufacturing of industrial cloth products, transmission belts, V-belts, rubber hoses, and rubber and plastic products; industrial single cord with industrial fabrics in the structure of the material; and heavy denier fiber and connection fabrics; as well as the processing and marketing of guide cloth products and other rubber reinforcement materials. The company also provides rubber cords and mechanical rubber good fabrics. In addition, it offers advanced composites to the civil aviation sector; and nylon 6, nylon 6.6, and polyethylene terephthalate high modulus low shrinkage polyester, as well as rayon heavy decitex yarns for use in tires and mechanical rubber goods. Further, the company offers composites technologies comprising polymeric matrix prepregs, ceramic matrix prepregs, slittape and towpreg products, films, honeycombs, and other products. The company was formerly known as Kordsa Endüstriyel Iplik ve Kord Bezi Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi and changed its name to Kordsa Teknik Tekstil A.S. in March 2017. The company was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Izmit, Turkey. Kordsa Teknik Tekstil A.S. is a subsidiary of Haci Ömer Sabanci Holding A.S.

The company also engages in steel structure manufacturing and assembly; casting and machining; energy business; and intra-city and intercity freight transportation activities. Kardemir Karabük Demir Çelik Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Karabük, Turkey.

stocks.name: Kardemir Karabük Demir Çelik Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Kardemir Karabük Demir Çelik Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells iron and steel, coke, and coke-by products in Turkey. The company also engages in steel structure manufacturing and assembly; casting and machining; energy business; and intra-city and intercity freight transportation activities. Kardemir Karabük Demir Çelik Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Karabük, Turkey.

stocks.name: Körfez Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.

stocks.name: Kron Teknoloji A.S.
stocks.description: Kron Teknoloji A.S. provides technology solutions for the operational efficiency and security needs of the corporates in the finance, energy, healthcare, and telecommunications sectors worldwide. It offers Kron PAM, a privileged access management suite; Kron PAM Password Vault, a centralized password management; Privileged Session Manager that monitors and controls privileged sessions on critical systems; Database Access Manager, a single point of access control management for the database layer and secures data access; Privileged Task Automation that provides a single interface to configure the ability of network business flows; Endpoint Privileged Management that allows IT administrators to control and monitor privileged users; User Behavior Analytics, which monitors user behavior and sessions; Multi-Factor Authentication that enhances data access security; Unified Access Manager, which offers built-in and pre-integrated TACACS+ and RADIUS servers that provide authentication, authorization, and accounting (AAA) services; and AAA Server & Subscriber Management, an authorization, authentication, and accounting platform. The company also provides Dynamic Data Masking that manages database access from a single point and provides role-based masking rules to restrict access to sensitive data; Data Stream Processing; Kron NPM, an network monitoring product; Quality Assurance, a distributed platform that enables scenario & model-driven proactive network and service quality measurements; and Network Configuration Management, which helps automate and take total control of the entire device configuration management. Kron Teknoloji A.S. was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Koroplast Temizlik Ambalaj Ürünleri Sanayi ve Dis Ticaret A.S.

The company also provides cooking products, such as baking paper, airfryer cooking paper, and oven bags; storage products comprising refrigerator bags, aluminum foil, stretch film, ziplock food storage bags, and freezer bags; natural baking paper, eco-friendly stretch film, and bamboo cleaning cloth; and cleaning products, including scouring wires, surface cleaning wipes, grease and dirt remover kitchen cloth, flat dish sponge sets, grooved dishwashing sponges, platinum sponges, drying cloth, and scented surface cleaning wipes, as well as microfiber cloth for cleaning, bath, kitchen, and glass cleaning. The company was founded in 1981 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Koroplast Temizlik Ambalaj Ürünleri Sanayi ve Dis Ticaret A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Korozo Ambalaj Sanayi Ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi.

stocks.name: Kristal Kola ve Mesrubat Sanayi Ticaret A.S.

In addition, the company offers security systems, which includes camera systems, time and attendance and access control systems, environmental security and management, and RFID solutions; intelligent traffic systems; cloud technologies and security, such as backup, security, server, enterprise system, and licensing solutions, as well as database support services and cybersecurity consulting; and digital transformation services and consulting. Further, it provides business intelligence solutions, predictive and preventive maintenance, synthetic data generation, and HMI IoT device tracking system; and GPS-based products, cold chain and temperature monitoring, parking and safety sensors, NBIoT and Lorawan, identity verification and authorization, and monitoring and tracking solutions. The company is also involved in the development, rental, and facility management of real estate projects, such as residences, offices, business centers, industrial centers, and shopping centers; and undertaking projects, including housing, industrial and healthcare buildings, shopping malls, art buildings, road and bridge constructions, and steel construction structures. Further, it produces and sells ERP, MRP, MRP2, web technologies, handheld terminal applications, mobile applications, CRM, e-government, e-invoice, and e-ledger solutions; turnkey milling, turnkey feed mills, and band/circular sawing machines, as well as pasta. It serves gas distribution companies, municipalities, water utilities, electricity distribution companies, and private and public institutions. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Sincan, Turkey.

stocks.name: Tureks Turunc Madencilik Ic ve Dis Ticaret A.S.

The company also offers travertine, onyx stones. Tureks Turunc Madencilik Ic ve Dis Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1982 and is based in Afyonkarahisar, Turkey.

The company was formerly known as Ansa Yatirim Holding A.S. and changed its name to Marka Yatirim Holding A.S. in May 2017. stocks.name: Marti Otel Isletmeleri A.S.

stocks.name: Meditera Tibbi Malzeme Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi

It also provides hospital products, such as barrier cream, surgical hand brushes for skin disinfection, hand and skin antiseptics, and skin and mucosa antiseptics. In addition, the company provides surgical solutions, including absorbable and absorbable sutures, and hemostatic products; installation, operation, and design of oncology drug preparation and delivery systems; production, sales, and technical service of infusion pumps and sets; and manufacturing of biocidal products. It also exports its products to 80 countries under its Altech brand name. Meditera Tibbi Malzeme Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Mega Polietilen Köpük Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi

The company also provides slippers, shoes, artificial and natural leather, cloth, yarn, sole lining, sole adhesives, polyethylene plates, porous foam plates, EVA plates, and EVA sole products. In addition, it produces textiles and textile auxiliary materials, including knitted and clothing textile products, and manufactures, weaves, knits, and crochets outerwear, such as coats, jackets, trousers, suits, anoraks, raincoats, and evening wear. The company serves customers in the footwear, promotion, textile, and related industries. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Adiyaman, Turkey.

The company also provides copper raw materials, copper concentrate, blister copper, anode/cathode copper, and enamel lathe, as well as wire scraps, electronic copper, copper wire rod, coppering, copper combustion, and other products. It serves energy generation and distribution, electricity, electronics, communication, renewable energy, electrical appliances, white goods, special industrial applications, aviation, and automotive sectors. The company exports its products. Mega Metal Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Meka Global Makine Imalat Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi

It offers stationary, mobile, compact, precast, dry batch, and RCC concrete batching plants; single and twin shaft and planetary concrete mixers; cement silos, fiber feeding-dosing systems, concrete recycling systems, and mobile aggregate feeding conveyors; concrete batching plant automation systems; and after sales services and spare parts. The company also provides feeders, such as apron, wobbler, pan feeder with grizzly scalper, vibrating, grizzly, and belt feeders; crushers, including jaw, primary, secondary, tertiary impact, vertical shaft, cone, and hammer crushers; horizontal, inclined, grizzly, dewatering, and scalping screens; log, coarse, material, fine material, and compact sand plants washers; belt conveyors; and plant automation systems. In addition, it offers mobile solutions, which includes portable screens, wash plants, jaw and cone crushers, two-stage plants, and horizontal and vertical shaft impact crushers; and recycling technologies comprising construction and demolition waste recycling, slag recycling for metal recovery, ceramic waste recycling, and quarry waste recycling. The company serves aggregates and concrete industries. The company was formerly known as Meka Beton Santralleri Imalat Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Meka Global Makine Imalat Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi in November 2025. The company was incorporated in 1987 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: Mepet Metro Petrol ve Tesisleri Sanayi Ticaret A.S.

It operates through Plant, Fuel, and Shopping Center segments. The company engages in the market, cafe, auto tire, and auto repair services; buying and selling of petroleum products and its derivatives; obtaining dealerships for petroleum companies; tourism-related activities; and acquiring, establishing, operating, and leasing tourism-related facilities, hotels, restaurants, shops, and buffets, as well as petroleum loading, unloading, storage, distribution, and filling facilities. It also operates rest areas and fuel stations for bus passengers, private vehicle passengers, and long-distance drivers; and shopping malls and highways. The company also offers stearic acid, woven paraffin, liquid paraffin 15, polyethylene wax, physical therapy paraffin, liquid paraffin 32, vaccine paraffin, pathology paraffin, microcrystalline wax, ski care paraffin, polywax, merwax antifrost, and disinfectants. Mercan Kimya Sanayi Ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Denizli, Turkey.

stocks.description: Metro Ticari ve Mali Yatirimlar Holding A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the investment, facility and hotel management, travel management, meat and meat product production, mine, and energy businesses in Turkey. It is also involved in the operation of domestic and international bus services under the METRO brand, as well as fuel stations and rest and road facilities; maintenance, repair, and spare parts for buses; production, breeding, care, fattening, slaughtering, preservation, purchase, sale, import, and export of ruminants and poultry; cruise and Umrah tours; visa and guidance services; organization of domestic and international touristic trips; road passenger transportation; tourism agency services; and investment activities. stocks.name: Pasifik Eurasia Lojistik Dis Ticaret A.S.
stocks.address: Kizilirmak Mah. Dumlupinar Bulvari (Eskisehir Yolu) No: 3
stocks.description: Pasifik Eurasia Lojistik Dis Ticaret A.S. provides international rail, air, land and sea freight transportation, and international water transportation services in Europe, Asia, and Russia. It operates as a logistics company. The company operates in the fields of cargo loading and unloading services, railway freight transportation agency, intercity cargo by road, foreign trade, and customs. It also provides solutions to international transportation, intermodal transportation, multimodal transport, logistics, and terminal services. Pasifik Eurasia Lojistik Dis Ticaret A.S. was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: Pasifik Teknoloji A.S.
stocks.description: Pasifik Teknoloji A.S. provides computer hardware, electronic products, and software products to corporate companies in Turkey. It offers cybersecurity and IT/hardware/infrastructure services, as well as offers defense technologies. The company was formerly known as Pasifik Donanim ve Yazilim Bilgi Teknolojileri A.S. and changed its name to Pasifik Teknoloji A.S. in August 2024. Pasifik Teknoloji A.S. was founded in 2015 and is based in Sariyer, Turkey.

stocks.name: PC Iletisim ve Medya Hizmetleri Sanayi Ticaret A.S.
stocks.address: Koza Is Merkezi C Blok No:14
stocks.description: PC Iletisim ve Medya Hizmetleri Sanayi Ticaret A.S. provides media and integrated communication planning services in Turkey. It provides traditional media planning and purchasing services for TV, newspapers, radio, outdoor cinema, internet, and magazines; evaluation services for media applications, sponsorships, integration, guerilla, and event marketing activities; digital performance agency; terrestrial and digital radio planning and purchasing services; and services in the areas of content marketing, collaborations, production, program buying and selling, brand partnerships, and small and medium-sized event organizations and planning. The company is also involved in advertising, reserving, and renting of media channels for advertising; and provision of promotional and printing services. PC Iletisim ve Medya Hizmetleri Sanayi Ticaret A.S. company was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Peker Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Peker Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi engages in the real estate investment business in Turkey, England, and Germany. The company qualifies as a real estate investment trust for federal income tax purposes. It generally would not be subject to federal corporate income taxes if it distributes at least 90% of its taxable income to its stockholders. The company was incorporated in 2017 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Penguen Gida Sanayi A.S.
stocks.description: Penguen Gida Sanayi A.S. engages in the production and sale of preserved products in Turkey. The company's products include jam, preserved vegetables, ready meals, preserved boiled legumes, tomato and pepper paste, pickles and frozen food. It offers its products to national and local market chains, and middle-sized retailers, as well as mass consumption channels, including hotels, restaurants, and cafeterias. The company exports its products to 35 countries, including Germany, the United States, France, the Netherlands, Switzerland, Russia, and Sweden. Penguen Gida Sanayi A.S. was incorporated in 1988 and is headquartered in Bursa, Turkey.

stocks.name: Penta Teknoloji Urunleri Dagitim Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Penta Teknoloji Urunleri Dagitim Ticaret A.S. distributes computer, hardware, and software products in Turkey. It offers Bazinet V3, a B2B e-commerce platform; Penta technology center, which provides demos, PoCs, hardware and software presentations, and end-to-end business solutions; and printing technology center that offers printing solutions and digital printing machines. The company also offers Penta subscription management solution, which helps to display and manage subscriptions; Penta Mywarehouse, for physical storage and online management; Penta Integration, a system for storage, logistics, sales, and marketing services; Penta OnAir, a communication platform to reach resellers and customers; and 10 to 10 delivery service. It also exports its products. Penta Teknoloji Urunleri Dagitim Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Pinar Entegre Et ve Un Sanayii A.S.
stocks.description: Pinar Entegre Et ve Un Sanayii A.S. produces and sells meat and by-products of bovine and ovine animals, poultry, and fish, as well as frozen dough products and ready meals under the Pinar brand in Turkey and internationally. It offers delicatessen products, including soudjouks, salamis, sausages, hams, smoked meats, and smoked raw meat products; frozen meat products, such as burgers, meatballs, and doner kebabs; frozen dough products comprising pizzas, puff pastries, mantis, and boyoz products. The company also provides frozen seafood products consisting of shrimps and squids, as well as anchovy, sardine, tuna, and haddock products; and unprocessed meat products, such as unprocessed beef, turkey, and lamb products. It offers its products through stores and e-commerce platforms, as well as exports its products. The company was incorporated in 1981 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. Pinar Entegre Et ve Un Sanayii A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Yasar Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Pinar Su ve Icecek Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Pinar Su ve Icecek Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells packaged water and beverage products in Turkey and internationally. It offers water carboy, fruit-flavored carbonated water, pet bottle, water glass bottle, and sparkling water; and functional beverages, such as cool lime, lemonade, ice tea, and frii. The company exports its products to the United Kingdom, Germany, Cyprus, Iraq, the United Arab Emirates, Romania, Azerbaijan, Bahrain, Ireland, Kosovo, and the United States. Pinar Su ve Icecek Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. Pinar Su ve Icecek Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Yasar Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Plastikkart Akilli Kart Iletisim Sistemleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Plastikkart Akilli Kart Iletisim Sistemleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells smart cards in Turkey and internationally. It offers contact, contactless, and dual interface banking/payment cards; loyalty and transportation cards; e-government and ID cards; payphone and metering cards; SIM cards; and security solutions, such as PKI cards, readers, and tokens. The company also provides security printing; card personalization; card life cycle management and processing; server hosting; and consultancy services, including card-based projects management, printing design consultancy, and card technology training services. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Plastikkart Akilli Kart Iletisim Sistemleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Gemalto B.V.

stocks.name: Petrokent Turizm A.S.
stocks.description: Petrokent Turizm A.S. engages in the operation of resorts. The company's facilities include VONRESORT golden beach and VONRESORT Abant resorts. Petrokent Turizm A.S. was incorporated in 1977 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: Platform Turizm Tasimacilik Gida Insaat Temizlik Hizmetleri Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Platform Turizm Tasimacilik Gida Insaat Temizlik Hizmetleri Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi provides personnel transportation and fleet leasing services in Türkiye and Pakistan. It offers personnel and student transportation, fleet car rental, construction equipment and equipped vehicle rental, cultural tour and camp organization, travel agency management, technical office personnel, food transportation and distribution, metrobus and public transportation, and recreational area management services, as well as personnel support services, such as police, cleaning, and security. The company was incorporated in 2002 and is based in Istanbul, Türkiye.

stocks.name: Panelsan Cati Cephe Sistemleri Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.address: Maidan Business and Life Center Mustafa Kemal Mahallesi 2118
stocks.description: Panelsan Cati Cephe Sistemleri Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells sandwich panels, EPS insulation materials, and other products in Turkey. The company offers facade, roof, acoustic, and cold room panels; EPS products, including thermal insulation boards, injection sheets, EPS blocks, light filling products, mold injection products, decorative ceiling coverings, and geopans; trapezoidal overlays; solar power plant solutions; and complementary products. It is also involved in manufacturing, purchase, sale, import, and production of heating, ventilation, cooling, insulation, and roofing and facade cladding materials; production, import, export, purchase, sale, and domestic trade of prefabricated thermally insulated construction elements; and the manufacturing and trade of marble, iron, cement, ready-mixed concrete, and hardware materials. The company was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: Pinar Süt Mamülleri Sanayii A.S.
stocks.description: Pinar Süt Mamülleri Sanayii A.S., through its subsidiaries, processes, produces, and sells milk and dairy products in Turkey and internationally. The company offers dairy products, including milk, butter, cheese, yoghurt, ayran, kefir, creams, fruit juices, sauces, whipped cream, milk powder, and out-of-home consumption products; water and beverages, such as frii, lemonade, and natural mineral and functional water; and meat products comprising soudjouk, salami, sausage, kavurma, ham, and smoked meat, as well as seafood and convenience food products under the Pinar brand name. It exports its products. The company was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. Pinar Süt Mamülleri Sanayii A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Yasar Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Polisan Holding A.S.
stocks.description: Polisan Holding A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production and sale of chemical products in Turkey. It operates through Chemical Products, Port, and Services segments. The company offers formaldehyde, formaldehyde resins, construction chemicals, and AUS 32; and pouring liquid storage, general warehouse, and loading and unloading services for dry bulk and general cargo vessels. It also provides polyethylene terephthalate granule and preform products for use in beverage, food, and drink containers, as well as in synthetic fibers. In addition, the company offers paints and construction chemicals. Further, the company provides port, storage, and warehousing services. Polisan Holding A.S. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Politeknik Metal Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Politeknik Metal Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi production and sale of aluminum surface treatment chemicals and the installation and sale of machinery and equipment in Turkey. The company offers aluminum surface finishing chemicals, turnkey anodizing lines, and equipment supply services, as well as engineering/design/consultancy services for anodizing lines. It also exports its products. The company was incorporated in 1985 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Politeknik Metal Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi operates as a subsidiary of Coventya Beteiligung GmbH.

stocks.name: Pardus Girisim Sermayesi Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Pardus Girisim Sermayesi Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi is a venture capital firm specializing in growth capital, restructuring and acquisitions. Pardus Girisim Sermayesi Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Türk Prysmian Kablo ve Sistemleri Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Türk Prysmian Kablo ve Sistemleri Anonim Sirketi manufactures and sells cables in Turkey and internationally. It offers energy, telecommunication, copper conductor communication, optical fiber, railway signalization, studio broadcast, and special cables, as well as conductors, machinery, apparatus, tools and equipment, spare parts and accessories, and asset monitoring systems and electronics under the Prysmian, Draka, and General Cable brand names. The company serves utilities and power grids, telecommunication, trade and installers, transportation and mobility, renewables, water treatment, oil and gas, nuclear, mining, military and defence, marine, crane, and other industries, as well as OEMs. It exports its products to approximately 50 countries. The company was formerly known as Turk Pirelli Kablo ve Sistemleri A.S. and changed its name to Türk Prysmian Kablo ve Sistemleri Anonim Sirketi in September 2005. Türk Prysmian Kablo ve Sistemleri Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 1964 and is headquartered in Mudanya, Turkey. The company operates as a subsidiary of Draka Holding B.V.

stocks.name: Park Elektrik Üretim Madencilik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Park Elektrik Üretim Madencilik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., through its subsidiary, Konya Ilgin Elektrik Üretim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., generates and sells electricity in Turkey. It focuses on establishing a thermal power plant with an installed capacity of 500MW installed capacity using fluidized bed boiler technology in Ilgin District, Konya. It is also involved in exploration, extraction, processing, and operation of various minerals, ores, and their derivatives; and textile business. It sells electrical energy to wholesale and retail license holders and free consumers. The company was incorporated in 1994 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Park Elektrik Üretim Madencilik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Park Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Prizma Pres Matbaacilik Yayincilik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Prizma Pres Matbaacilik Yayincilik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. engages in the printing and publishing activities in Turkey. The company offers printing services for textbooks and supplementary textbooks, children's story and fairy tale books, and question banks and test books. It also engages in the purchasing and selling of paper; publishing and distribution of books, newspapers, and magazines; and importing and selling of printing machines. Prizma Pres Matbaacilik Yayincilik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Pergamon Status Dis Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Pergamon Status Dis Ticaret A.S. operates as a mediate in the exports and imports of manufacturers in various industries. The company provides export mediation services; and tax and foreign trade consultancy services related to tax, other financial legislations, customs, foreign exchange, export, import, inward processing, factoring, and Exim loans in foreign trade. It also offers legislation and bulletin services, such as changes and developments in tax and other financial legislation, and foreign trade legislation. In addition, the company is involved in contact meetings and panels; and information sharing services, such as information about the seminars, panels, or conferences. The company was formerly known as Pergamos Dis Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Pergamon Status Dis Ticaret A.S. as a result of its merger with Status Dis Ticaret A.S. in 2005. Pergamon Status Dis Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Pasifik Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Pasifik Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. focuses on operating as a REIT company in Turkey. It has various mixed projects. The company is based in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: QUA Granite Hayal Yapi ve Ürünleri Sanayi Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: QUA Granite Hayal Yapi ve Ürünleri Sanayi Ticaret A.S. manufactures, exports, and sells ceramics, floor tiles, tile materials, and granite in Turkey, Europe, the United States, and internationally. It also offers bathroom, kitchen, garden, interior, and exterior tiles. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Aydin, Turkey.

stocks.name: Ral Yatirim Holding A.S.
stocks.description: Ral Yatirim Holding A.S. engages in the construction, energy, properties, and education activities. It carries contracting works for residential projects, as well as large public projects. The company is also involved in the production and sale of renewable and clean energy; and produces calcites. Ral Yatirim Holding A.S. was incorporated in 1976 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: Ray Sigorta Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Ray Sigorta Anonim Sirketi engages in the non-life insurance business in Turkey. The company offers personal accidents, casco, motor third party liability, travel, workplace, cyber security, health, and home insurance. It also provides fire, TCIP, marine, casualty, engineering, liability, and agriculture insurance, as well as motor own damage; motor facultative TPL; legal protection; and company's personal accident for buses insurance products. It sells its products through agencies, agency branches, brokers, broker branches, banks, and leasing companies. The company was incorporated in 1958 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Ray Sigorta Anonim Sirketi operates as a subsidiary of ATBIH GmbH.

stocks.name: Reeder Teknoloji Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Reeder Teknoloji Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi produces and sells e-book readers, smart mobile phones and accessories, smart watches, and tablets in Turkey. The company also offers robot vacuum cleaners and smart televisions. Further, it manufactures and trades of computer peripherals and electric vehicles. In addition, it sells its products through online. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Samsun, Turkey.

stocks.name: RONESANS GAYRIMENKUL YAT.
stocks.description: Ronesans Gayrimenkul Yatirim A.S., together with its subsidiaries, operates as the commercial real estate development and investment company in Türkiye. The company develops and manages shopping malls, office buildings, and other commercial real estate projects, as well as residential properties. It also provides management and consulting and asset management services, as well as rents investment properties. Ronesans Gayrimenkul Yatirim A.S. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey. Ronesans Gayrimenkul Yatirim A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Ronesans Varlik ve Proje Yatirimlari A.S.

stocks.name: Rainbow Polikarbonat Sanayi Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Rainbow Polikarbonat Sanayi Ticaret Anonim Sirketi provides polycarbonate, polymer, plastic, and related products. It offers polycarbonate roof panels, polycarbonate H and U shape products, rainbow 27/200 products, and polycarbonate hollow sheets. Rainbow Polikarbonat Sanayi Ticaret Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 1995 and is based in Kayseri, Türkiye.

stocks.name: Rodrigo Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Rodrigo Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the textile business in Turkey and internationally. The company offers various men clothing under the Rodrigo brand name. It sells its products through stores and online. The company was incorporated in 1997 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Royal Hali Iplik Tekstil Mobilya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Royal Hali Iplik Tekstil Mobilya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells carpets in Turkey. The company was formerly known as Naksan Kimya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Royal Hali Iplik Tekstil Mobilya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. in December 2007. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Gaziantep, Turkey. Royal Hali Iplik Tekstil Mobilya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of NAKSAN Holding.

stocks.name: RTA Laboratuvarlari Biyolojik Urunler Ilac ve Makine Sanayi Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: RTA Laboratuvarlari Biyolojik Urunler Ilac ve Makine Sanayi Ticaret A.S. engages in the research, development, and production of microbiology and molecular biology products in Turkey. It offers real-time PCR kits, nucleic acid extraction kits, microbiology media, microbiology stains, and rapid tests; standards and reference materials, and membrane filters; chemicals and reactives, membrane filters, microbiology gas generators, and other consumables; and instruments and consumables. RTA Laboratuvarlari Biyolojik Urunler Ilac ve Makine Sanayi Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1996 and is based in Kocaeli, Turkey.

stocks.name: Rubenis Tekstil Sanayi Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Rubenis Tekstil Sanayi Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells cotton yarns and fabrics under Mayer brand in Turkey and internationally. The company offers yarn; and knitted fabrics, including supreme, jacquard supreme, interlock, jacquard interlock, ribana, kasch-korse, piqué, two-thread, three-thread, selanik, ottoman, crepe, and double fresh. It is also involved in dye and finishing activities; and construction and air conditioning businesses. Rubenis Tekstil Sanayi Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Sanliurfa, Turkey.

stocks.name: Reysas Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Reysas Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is a privately owned real estate investment trust.  It invests in the real estate markets of Turkey. The firm invests in the warehousing market. Reysas Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Reysas Tasimacilik ve Lojistik Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Reysas Tasimacilik ve Lojistik Ticaret A.S. provides logistics solutions in Turkey and internationally. The company offers local transportation and distribution, automotive logistics, warehousing, railway transportation, international services, fuel logistics, and bonded warehousing. It also provides technology solutions, such as software services and vehicle tracking systems. In addition, the company distributes and markets tobacco products, and operates vehicle inspection station, as well as engages in the real estate investments. Reysas Tasimacilik ve Lojistik Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1989 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Safkar Ege Sogutmacilik Klima Soguk Hava Tesisleri Ihracat Ithalat Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Safkar Ege Sogutmacilik Klima Soguk Hava Tesisleri Ihracat Ithalat Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi produces and sells air conditioners in Turkey. The company offers bus, midibus, minibus, metro, tram, train, refrigerated coolers, defense industry products, electric vehicle air conditioners. It also manufactures and sells air conditioning and cold air facilities for motorized road vehicles, rail systems, and marine transportation vehicles. Safkar Ege Sogutmacilik Klima Soguk Hava Tesisleri Ihracat Ithalat Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Saray Matbaacilik Kagitçilik kirtasiyecilik Ticaret Ve Sanayi A.S.
stocks.description: Saray Matbaacilik Kagitçilik kirtasiyecilik Ticaret Ve Sanayi A.S. engages in the production and sale of stationery products in Turkey. The company provides paper products, including woodfree offset printing, coated, photocopy, and book papers; exercise books, such as PP cover, wire-o-spiral, single spiral, soft cover, spiral binding, stapled binding, glued binding, and hard cover notebooks; and calendars. It also provides a range of services comprising printing preparation, pre printing, and after printing, as well as paper sheeting services; and sheet-fed offset, web offset, and continuous form printing systems. In addition, it provides food packaging products comprising paper bag for pastries, simit, and pita bread; baklava, cake, and tart boxes; black sea pita bread, hamburger, and chip boxes; polyethylene-coated paper for paper plates and cups; metallized lid for aluminum food containers; and polyethylene butcher paper. The company offers its products and services under the Yildiz Yayincilik, Vizyon, Papicat, and SRY,BIL brands. It exports its products to England, Sweden, Hungary, Greece, and Israel. The company was founded in 1982 and is based in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: San-el Mühendislik Elektrik Taahhüt Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.address: Burhaniye Mah. Kanuni Sultan Süleyman Sokak.
stocks.description: San-el Mühendislik Elektrik Taahhüt Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. designs, manufactures, and sells electrical panels in Turkey. It offers LV panel, LV harmonic filter system, MV compensation and harmonic filter, SVC flicker compensation, and weak current systems, as well as OG metal clad cells. The company engages in distribution of control panels related activities. It also operates in the field of turnkey electrical contracting; provides energy quality analysis and reporting services in transmission and distribution network. San-el Mühendislik Elektrik Taahhüt Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Sanifoam Endustri ve Tuketim Urunleri Sanayi Ticaret A.S.
stocks.address: Gazi Osman Pasa OSB Mah. 21. Sk. No: 6/A
stocks.description: Sanifoam Endustri ve Tuketim Urunleri Sanayi Ticaret A.S., together with its subsidiaries, produces, converts, and supplies industrial and cleaning products in Turkey and internationally. It offers Basotect and Firex foams; Echobon, a high-density ecological insulation material; Echopol, a low-density flexible foam product; SaniFilter material; SaniShine, a high strength flexible polyurethane foam; SaniHydro sponge; SaniFelt, a fibre felt product; SaniSeal, a sealing material; SaniTape, a self-adhesive tape; coating and layering products; and SaniWood, a plywood and compact laminate product. The company also provides scrubber sponges, cleaning clothes, bath sponges, and scouring fibers, as well as car sponges with shampoo under the Sanitex, Star, and Blues brands; microfiber clothes, stainless steel scourers, and melamine and cellulosic sponges; and polyether and polyester sponges. In addition, it offers logistics, storage, and distribution services. The company serves the automotive, home appliances, industrial insulation, acoustics, and cleaning sectors. It exports its products. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is headquartered in Tekirdag, Turkey.

stocks.name: Sanko Pazarlama Ithalat Ihracat Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Sanko Pazarlama Ithalat Ihracat Anonim Sirketi develops, purchases, imports, exports, markets, and sells dyed and undyed yarns made from artificial and synthetic fibers in Turkey and internationally. The company offers hydrophilic cotton weaving, knitting, and garment industrial goods and other textile products. It also provides ring carded and combed, melange, slub, core spun, dyed, core twist, and organic cotton yarns; and knitted fabrics, such as single jersey, rib, interlock, two and three thread fleece, terry and towel, and pique fabrics, as well as knitted fabrics with elasthane. In addition, the company offers woven fabrics, including stretch, novelty, and overdyed denim fabrics; sportswear; cotton woven fabrics; cot-stretch fabrics; color woven products; and curduroy fabrics, as well as printed fabrics. The company was formerly known as Temko Pazarlama Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi and changed its name to Sanko Pazarlama Ithalat Ihracat Anonim Sirketi in March 1998. Sanko Pazarlama Ithalat Ihracat Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Gaziantep, Turkey.

stocks.name: Sarkuysan Elektrolitik Bakir Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Sarkuysan Elektrolitik Bakir Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., together with its subsidiaries, produces and trades in electrolytic copper wires, copper pipes, coppering, and copper alloys in Turkey. It offers electrolytic copper cathode products; oxygen free and ETP wire rods; DHP and ETP copper billets; bare, tin plated, and nickel-plated copper single wires; bare and tin plated, and nickel plated multi wires, as well as bare and tin plated multi wires on braider bobbins; and bare, tin plated, and nickel plated bunched conductors. The company also provides flat wires and profiles, and PV ribbon wires; copper and copper alloy contact wires, and stranded copper and copper alloy conductors; copper tubes and busbars; and copper nuggets. In addition, it offers electrolytic copper conductors; packaging materials and manufacturing machinery; and hermetic compressor parts, scroll compressor parts, nodular and gray iron parts, brake and vented brake discs, hub drums, flywheels, exhaust manifolds, rings, brake cylinders, and brackets and brake security parts. Further, the company is involved in marketing and distribution and real estate rental activities. Its products are used in various industries, including electro techniques, electronic, motor, communication, power generation and distribution, solar and renewable energy, home appliances, measurement instruments, defense, automotive, chemical, construction, heating ventilation, air-conditioning, and sanitary plumbing. The company also exports its products to approximately 80 countries worldwide. Sarkuysan Elektrolitik Bakir Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1972 and is headquartered in Darica, Turkey.

stocks.name: Say Yenilenebilir Enerji Ekipmanlari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Say Yenilenebilir Enerji Ekipmanlari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells renewable energy equipment in Turkey. The company offers steel, aluminum, and other materials for electricity generation; and material, components, and integrated parts, such as internal and external components of wind turbine towers; wind turbine generator components; and wind turbine component transport equipment. It also engages in trade, marketing, and sales activities; industrial advertising; visual communication of buildings and open spaces designing; manufacturing and assembly; interior and exterior furniture and decoration works; steel and reinforced concrete structure manufacturing, purchase, and sale; project contracting; and exterior industrial coating works. The company was formerly known as Say Reklamcilik Yapi Dekorasyon Proje Taahhüt Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Say Yenilenebilir Enerji Ekipmanlari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. in October 2020. Say Yenilenebilir Enerji Ekipmanlari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: SDT Uzay ve Savunma Teknolojileri Anonim Sirketi
stocks.address: Üniversiteler Mahallesi Ihsan Dogramaci Bulvari No:37/1
stocks.description: SDT Uzay ve Savunma Teknolojileri Anonim Sirketi engages in the production, sale, import, and export of electrotechnical, electronic, and electromechanical and mechatronic products related to space and defense technologies in Turkey. The company offers radar, electronic warfare, and communication systems; mission systems, including platform management systems, digital data recorders, and weapon systems; and simulation systems and information technologies, such as air combat training, land combat training, and naval combat training systems, as well as information technologies. It also provides production programmes comprising RF jammer systems, munition guidance electronics, and integrated system solutions. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: SEGMEN KARDESLER GIDA
stocks.description: Segmen Kardesler Gida Üretim ve Ambalaj Sanayi Anonim Sirketi produces and sells food products in Turkey. The company offers jams, honey, halva, nut butter, turkish delight, tahini and molasses, herbal teas, spices, jam, marmalades, peanut butter, and hazelnut cream. The company was founded in 1938 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: Seker Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Seker Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Seker Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Sekerbank T.A.S.

stocks.name: Seker Finansal Kiralama A.S.
stocks.description: Seker Finansal Kiralama A.S. provides equipment financing and leasing services. It offers leasing services for the purchase of production machinery, construction equipment and forklifts, logistics transportation and transportation equipment, commercial/passenger vehicles, agriculture equipment, medical devices, yachts and boats, real estate, and energy production and technology packages, as well as real estate comprising business premises, offices, factory buildings, lands, etc. The company also provides operational leasing, SME, women entrepreneurs, start-up, and sales lease back packages; and insurance services. Seker Finansal Kiralama A.S. was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Sekuro Plastik Ambalaj Sanayi A.S.
stocks.description: Sekuro Plastik Ambalaj Sanayi A.S. engages in the manufacturing and sales of plastic packaging products in Turkey. The company offers PE air bubble films, such as standard bubble films, opaque protection products, and insulation products. It also provides PE shrink films; PE general packaging films; bag and sheet products; and technical films. The company was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Selçuk Ecza Deposu Ticaret ve Sanayi A.S.
stocks.description: Selçuk Ecza Deposu Ticaret ve Sanayi A.S., together with its subsidiary, operates as a pharmacy depot in Turkey. In addition, the company is involved in operation of pharmaceutical warehouses; and distributes cosmetics, personal care, infant food, vitamins, medical, and other products. The company was founded in 1958 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Selçuk Ecza Deposu Ticaret ve Sanayi A.S. is a subsidiary of Selçuk Ecza Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Selva Gida Sanayi A.S.
stocks.description: Selva Gida Sanayi A.S. manufactures and sells various food products in Turkey. It offers various types of pasta, such as penne rigate, farfalle, sedanini, fusilli, elbow, elbow rigate, ditalini, farfalle tonde, ditaloni, pipe rigate, tagliatelle, bucatini, linguine, spaghetti, vermicelli, risoni, and filini; as well as wheat flour and semolina. The company also provides soup, dessert, and salad products. In addition, it is involved in the catering business. The company was incorporated in 1988 and is headquartered in Konya, Turkey.

stocks.name: Seyitler Kimya Sanayi A.S.
stocks.description: Seyitler Kimya Sanayi A.S. develops and sells medical adhesive tape products in Turkey, the Middle East, Africa, Europe, and the Americas. The company offers surgical tapes, injection series, wound care, skin closure strip and eye pads, first aid strips, dialysis sets, heat patches, compress and swab, ointments, hemostatic series, and silicone products. Seyitler Kimya Sanayi A.S. was incorporated in 1991 and is headquartered in Turgutlu, Turkey.

stocks.name: Silverline Endustri ve Ticaret A.S.
