stocks.description: Silverline Endustri ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells built-in kitchen appliances in Turkey and internationally. The company offers aspirators, range hoods, and ovens; built-in hoods; glass built-in, induction, and vitro ceramic hobs; ceiling, island, suspended, and wall-mounted hoods; worktops; and air-conditioning products. It also provides maintenance and cleaning services. The company sells its products through its online shop. The company was formerly known as Gumusfon Metal Endustri ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Silverline Endustri ve Ticaret A.S. in 2005. Silverline Endustri ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1994 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Söktas Tekstil Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Söktas Tekstil Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S., through its subsidiaries, provides cotton and cotton-blended shirting fabric products in Turkey and internationally. The company is involved in transfer, spinning, and gassing cotton and staple yarns; and yarn and fabric trading business. Söktas Tekstil Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1971 and is headquartered in Aydin, Turkey.

stocks.name: Skyalp Finansal Teknolojiler ve Danismanlik A.S.
stocks.description: Skyalp Finansal Teknolojiler ve Danismanlik A.S. an investment company, engages in the incubation and investment in financial technology companies in Turkey. It operates Napolyon, personal banking platform; Sysline, a software company provides consulting, UX/UI design, software services, infrastructure services, and information technology; and TeklifimGelsin, a personalized financial marketplace. The company also engages in the Fintables, an analysis platform; Idealdata, provides users with domestic and international market data, news and analysis, and software support; FTech Labs, provides technology-enabled financial solutions; and Juphy, a comprehensive communication and collaboration platform. The company was formerly known as Ideal Finansal Teknolojiler ve Danismanlik Anonim Sirketi and changed its name to Skyalp Finansal Teknolojiler ve Danismanlik A.S. in February 2024. Skyalp Finansal Teknolojiler ve Danismanlik A.S. was incorporated in 1998 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: SEKER YATIRIM
stocks.description: Seker Yatirim Menkul Degerler A.S. engages in capital market business in Turkey. It offers equity trading, Seker Worldwide Exchanges and Electronic Trading, fixed income trading, corporate financing, research, asset management, investment advisory services, derivatives trading, and FX trading. The company was incorporated in 1996 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Seker Yatirim Menkul Degerler A.S. is a subsidiary of Sekerbank T.A.S.

stocks.name: Smartiks Yazilim A.S.
stocks.description: Smartiks Yazilim A.S. provides business solutions, software development, and consultancy services in Türkiye. It offers data security, outsourcing, analysis and process management, data science, data warehouse, customer relationship management, human resources, and software development services Smartiks Yazilim A.S. was founded in 2006 and is based in Istanbul, Türkiye.

stocks.name: Smart Günes Enerjisi Teknolojileri Arastirma ve Gelistirme Üretim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Smart Günes Enerjisi Teknolojileri Arastirma ve Gelistirme Üretim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., an integrated solar technology company, produces solar photovoltaic modules in Turkey. The company installs renewable energy plants; and provides engineering and labor services. In addition, it engages in selling and marketing various solar power plant system equipment. Further, the company is involved in the research and development activities for the electrical energy sector, including power grids and power generation facilities; provides maintenance and operation services of technical infrastructure and systems; manages turnkey projects for the electrical energy sector; offers project installation and maintenance repairs of low voltage lines and facilities, electrical networks, transformers, electricity distribution panels and tables, control systems, and meters. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Smart Günes Enerjisi Teknolojileri Arastirma ve Gelistirme Üretim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Smart Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Sinpas Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Sinpas Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S., formerly Sinpas Insaat, is a Turkish real estate investment trust (REIT) transformed into a REIT in 2007. It focuses on developing residential and sales real estate projects and operates under the Sinpas Group Companies. In 2018, Sinpas GYO merged with Sinpas Yapi to enhance operational and economic synergies. Following the merger, the company's capital increased to 873.2 million TL. As of March 2025, the Group employs 188 people and is headquartered in Besiktas, Istanbul. Sinpas Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. was incorporated in 2006 in Turkey.

stocks.name: Sanica Isi Sanayi A.S.
stocks.description: Sanica Isi Sanayi A.S. produces and sells radiators, towel warmers, boilers, built-in reservoirs, control panels, and underground and aboveground pipes in Türkiye. The company offers condensing and combi boilers; standard and design panel radiators; aluminum, stainless steel, steel design, and column radiators, as well as accessories; and standard and dizayn towel rails. It also provides pipe, heating, bathroom, and infrastructure products. The company sells its products under the Sanica brand. Sanica Isi Sanayi A.S. was incorporated in 1982 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Sönmez Pamuklu Sanayii A.S.
stocks.description: Sönmez Pamuklu Sanayii A.S. engages in the manufacturing and dyeing of artificial, synthetic, and blended textile yarns and fabrics in Turkey. It is also involved in real estate leasing activities. Sönmez Pamuklu Sanayii A.S. was founded in 1981 and is based in Bursa, Turkey.

stocks.name: Sodas Sodyum Sanayii A.S.
stocks.description: Sodas Sodyum Sanayii A.S. produces and sells lake mining-related chemicals in Turkey. The company offers natural sodium sulphate for use in the manufacturing of detergents, textile dyes, glasses, paper, fertilizers, animal feed, and various chemicals. It also provides sodium chloride (salt) for the food, textile, leather, detergent, animal feed, and health sectors, as well as against icing on highways in winter. In addition, the company operates mining sites for natural sodium sulphate. Sodas Sodyum Sanayii A.S. was incorporated in 1974 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Sönmez Filament Sentetik Iplik ve Elyaf Sanayi A.S.
stocks.description: Sönmez Filament Sentetik Iplik ve Elyaf Sanayi A.S. manufactures and sells yarns and fibers in Turkey. The company offers poy, plain, textured, twisted, dyed, flag, and other polyester yarn products for the automotive industry, as well as various fiber products. It also engages in the rental of real estate properties. The company was incorporated in 1972 and is headquartered in Bursa, Turkey.

stocks.name: Servet Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Servet Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is a real estate investment trust. Servet Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is based in Instanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Sumas Suni Tahta ve Mobilya Sanayi A.S.
stocks.description: Sumas Suni Tahta ve Mobilya Sanayi A.S. produces and sells oriented strand board (OSB) panels and glue products in Turkey. The company also provides natural fuel pellets. Its products are used in various applications, such as roof sheathing, underlayment for shingles, flooring, and combined and single applications; used in vehicle body manufacturing, interior decoration work, and packaging industry; store, shop construction and decoration, and interior parts of barracks and prefabricated structures; spaces like warehouses, stages, gyms, schools and carpentry applications; construction of moisture-resistant, flat, and insulated surfaces; structural floors, walls, and partitions; and used in wall claddings and under sidings. Sumas Suni Tahta ve Mobilya Sanayi A.S. was incorporated in 1976 and is headquartered in Balikesir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Sun Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.address: Yedi Eylül Mah. Celal Umur Cad. No: 6/A
stocks.description: Sun Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. designs, produces, and sells women's clothing collections for brands operating in the retail sector in Turkey and internationally. The company offers knit fabrics and ready-made womenswear garments. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Suwen Tekstil Sanayi Pazarlama A.S.
stocks.address: Fatih Sultan Mehmet Mah. Balkan Cad. No: 39-41
stocks.description: Suwen Tekstil Sanayi Pazarlama A.S. produces and sells underwear, home wear, and beach wear in Turkey. It provides bra, briefs, undershirts, corsets, pajama sets, night gowns, robes, bikinis, swimsuits, pantyhose, tights, bra accessories, and socks for women. It also offers body mists, soaps, lip oils, and colognes. The company sells its products in retail stores with its own brand, and on its own e-commerce website. The company was formerly known as Ekofer Tesktil Parfümeri Sanayi Pazarlama Limited Sirketi and changed its name to Suwen Tekstil Sanayi Pazarlama A.S. in July 2018. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Tarkim Bitki Koruma Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Tarkim Bitki Koruma Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces, sells, and markets plant protection products. The company offers fungicide, herbicide, and insecticides. It is also involved in various plant programs. The company was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Manisa, Turkey.

stocks.name: Tatlipinar Enerji Uretim A.S.
stocks.description: Tatlipinar Enerji Uretim A.S. engages in the renewable energy generation business in Turkey. The company engages in the establishing and commissioning of facilities for producing renewable energy; electricity production facilities; solar, wind, hydroelectric and all kinds of renewable energy systems; and selling produced electrical energy. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Tat Gida Sanayi A.S.
stocks.description: Tat Gida Sanayi A.S., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells tomato products in Turkey and internationally. The company offers tomato paste, ketchup sauces, convenience food, pickles, canned food, and ready meals. It also engages in the production, distribution, marketing, trading, and brokerage of commercial goods; food; beverages; agricultural and animal food products in frozen, dried, and powdered forms; raw materials; auxiliary and additive materials; sugary and sugar-free juices and preserves; and semi-finished and finished products. The company exports its products. The company was formerly known as Tat Konserve Sanayii AS. and changed its name to Tat Gida Sanayi A.S. in November 2013. Tat Gida Sanayi A.S. was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Türk Tuborg Bira ve Malt Sanayii A.S.
stocks.description: Türk Tuborg Bira ve Malt Sanayii A.S. produces, sells, and distributes beer and malt in Turkey and internationally. The company offers its products under the Tuborg, Carlsberg, FREDERIK, Troy, and 1664 Blanc brands, as well as imports GUINNESS, Weihenstephan, KILKENNY, Grimbergen, DESPERADOS, CAMPARI, APEROL, CINZANO, and SOL brands. It also exports its products to various countries, such as the United Kingdom, the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus, and Iraq. The company was incorporated in 1967 and is based in Izmir, Turkey. Türk Tuborg Bira ve Malt Sanayii A.S. is a subsidiary of International Beer Breweries Ltd.

stocks.name: Trend Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Trend Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is a real estate investment manager engages in the real estate business in Turkey. It develops and constructs various real estate projects, such as houses, hotels, residence, and university buildings. The company was formerly known as Anda Gayrimenkul Gelistirme ve Insaat Sanayi Ticaret Limited Sirketi and changed its name to Trend Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. in November 2017. Trend Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. was founded in 2006 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Tek-Art Insaat Ticaret Turizm Sanayi ve Yatirimlar Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Tek-Art Insaat Ticaret Turizm Sanayi ve Yatirimlar Anonim Sirketi engages in the tourism business in Turkey and internationally. The company invests, builds, and operates hotels, holiday villages, resorts, golf facilities, restaurants, cafeterias, casinos and entertainment venues, beaches, amusement parks, marinas, yacht docks, tourist goods outlets, and regulation schools and related facilities. It conducts hotel management activities at the Zigana Hotel resort. In addition, the company offers tourism transportation and rental car operations, as well as acts as a travel agent. Further, it operates stores, display areas, and warehouses in ports and free zones. Tek-Art Insaat Ticaret Turizm Sanayi ve Yatirimlar Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 1987 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Tera Yatirim Menkul Degerler A.S.
stocks.description: Tera Yatirim Menkul Degerler A.S. engages in investment banking and brokerage activities in Turkey. The company offers institutional sales and trading services for mutual funds, hedge funds, and alpha capture funds investors; private sales and trading services, as well as personalized financial advisory services, stocks, bonds, and funds; and investment banking services, such as initial public offering underwriting, debt instrument issuance facilitation, capital increase support, company valuation, financing options, and merger and acquisition consultancy. It is also involved in facilitating share purchase offers, exit rights, and rights to withdraw from partnership/sell; and managing the process of wholesale market transactions and the process of sales to corporate and qualified investors. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Europap Tezol Kagit Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Europap Tezol Kagit Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells cleaning papers and paper rolls materials in Turkey. It offers jumbo rolls, napkins, facial tissues, pocket tissues, Z-towel, dispenser towels, toilet papers, and kitchen towels under the Softy, Mare, Ecco Y.D, and Dolce brands as well as private label brands. The company was incorporated in 1969 and is based in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: TGS Dis Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.address: Büyükdere Cad. Özsezen Is Merkezi D
stocks.description: TGS Dis Ticaret Anonim Sirketi provides intermediary services to exporting companies in Turkey. Its primary activity is to mediate the export activities of the manufacturers and to collect the value-added tax refunds on behalf of its customers due to their export transactions in the textile, mining, and other sectors. The company was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Tekfen Holding Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Tekfen Holding Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, engages in engineering and contracting, agriculture, and investment businesses in Turkey, CIS, the Middle Eastern countries, and internationally. The company provides turnkey solutions for various facilities, including pipelines, oil and gas terminals, tank farms, oil refineries, offshore oil rigs, pump and compressor stations, power plants, industrial plants, petrochemical plants, highway and metro projects, sports complexes, steel structures, and superstructure and infrastructure projects. It is also involved in the agricultural input production of seeds and saplings, as well as the production of fertilizers. In addition, the company engages in trading, agriculture shipping agent, fruit manufacturing, fertilizer trade, and energy activities. Further, it provides insurance and management services. Tekfen Holding Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1956 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Teknosa Iç ve Dis Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Teknosa Iç ve Dis Ticaret Anonim Sirketi engages in the retail sale of technology products in Turkey. It offers solar energy systems and air conditioning, as well as sells electronic products to companies. The company sells its products through its stores. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Teknosa Iç ve Dis Ticaret Anonim Sirketi is a subsidiary of Haci Ömer Sabanci Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Trabzon Liman Isletmeciligi Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Trabzon Liman Isletmeciligi Anonim Sirketi operates the port of Trabzon. It engages in the loading, unloading, transfer, and handling operations; supplying water to ships; loading, unloading, and transferring fuel; pilotage services to ships, water, and fuel; transportation services; and porterage work and establishing facilities. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Trabzon, Turkey.

stocks.name: Temapol Polimer Plastik ve Insaat Sanayi Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Temapol Polimer Plastik ve Insaat Sanayi Ticaret Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells thermoplastic sheets in Turkey and internationally. The company offers plastic polymer sheets to the furniture, plumbing, construction, home appliances, sanitary, automotive and vehicle, temaglass, white goods and cooling, medical, advertising goods, and high gloss acrylic industries. It also provides plastic, polymer, and similar products; packaging works; and printing services. In addition, the company engages in the production and sale of tempered glass; and construction contracting works and projects of the Build-Lease-Transfer model. It exports its products. Temapol Polimer Plastik ve Insaat Sanayi Ticaret Anonim Sirketi was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Kayseri, Turkey.

stocks.name: Turcas Holding A.S.
stocks.description: Turcas Holding A.S. operates as a petrol and energy-focused investment company in Turkey. It operates through Petrol and Electricity segments. The company's products include lubricants, fuel, and engine oil. It is also involved in the power generation activities. Turcas Holding A.S. was formerly known as Turcas Petrol A.S. and changed its name to Turcas Holding A.S. in August 2025. The company was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Turcas Holding A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Aksoy Girisimcilik Enerji Ve Turizm A.S.

stocks.name: Torunlar Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Torunlar Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. (Torunlar GYO). The Company was established in Istanbul, Turkiye, in 1996 under the name Toray Construction Industry and Trade Inc. The Company with the amendment to the articles of association published in the Trade Registry Gazette on January 25, 2008, it was registered as Torunlar Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. on January 21, 2008. The Company is registered with the Capital Markets Board, and its shares have been traded on Borsa Istanbul since October 21, 2010. The Company operates in Turkiye. As of June 30, 2025, the Company had 55 employees (December 31, 2024: 56), and the ultimate parent company is the Torun Family. The company is registered with the Istanbul Chamber of Commerce in Turkiye. The Company's main field of activity is to engage in real estate, real estate-based capital market instruments, real estate projects and investments in capital market instruments, as outlined in the CMB's regulations on real estate investment trusts. Torunlar Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. registered address is Ruzgarlibahçe Mahallesi Ozalp Çikmazi No: 4 Beykoz 34805 Istanbul/Turkiye.

stocks.name: Turk Ilac Ve Serum Sanayi Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Turk Ilac Ve Serum Sanayi Anonim Sirketi produces and sells human tablets, capsules, ampoules, vials, ointments-creams, intravenous serums, parenteral solutions, nutritional solutions, amino acids, and other chemicals in Turkey. It also offers bulb, biological, and serum products, as well as medical devices. Turk Ilac Ve Serum Sanayi Anonim Sirketi was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: TSKB Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S
stocks.description: TSKB Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S invests in real estate projects, capital market instruments backed by real estate, real estate development projects, and other capital market instruments. Its real estate development projects include shopping centers, hotels, office buildings, and others. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Beyoglu, Turkey.

stocks.name: Türkiye Sinai Kalkinma Bankasi A.S.
stocks.description: Türkiye Sinai Kalkinma Bankasi A.S. operates as a development and investment bank in Turkey. The company offers corporate loans for renewable energy, industrial investments, energy and resource efficiency, women's employment and equal opportunity, environmental investments, investments in developing regions, research and development and innovation, occupational health and safety, education and health investments, and working capital financing. It also provides project finance for energy generation and power plants, including hydroelectric, geothermal, wind, solar, biomass, and combined cycle natural gas plants; electricity and natural gas distribution projects; mergers and acquisitions; logistics, transportation, and telecommunications; and public - private partnership projects. In addition, the company offers other loan products, such as financial leasing, foreign trade finance, letter of guarantees/external guarantees/letter of credits, export credits / Eximbank aval credits, and country loans. Further, the company provides corporate finance products and services consisting of public offering preparation and brokerage, debt instrument issues, and mergers and acquisitions advisory; derivatives products comprising forward contracts, options, caps and floors, swap transactions, and swaptions; derivative transactions; brokerage for stock and bonds trading; currency exchange, repo, warrant, and foreign derivative transactions; securities loans; and portfolio management and investment consulting services. Additionally, it provides financial planning and strategy, feasibility, valuation, and restructuring services, as well as sectoral analysis studies; engineering and technical consultancy services; and financial technical advisory, real estate appraisal, economic research, and sustainability consultancy services. Türkiye Sinai Kalkinma Bankasi A.S. was incorporated in 1950 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Trabzonspor Sportif Yatirim ve Futbol Isletmeciligi Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Trabzonspor Sportif Yatirim ve Futbol Isletmeciligi Ticaret A.S. operates Trabzonspor professional football team in Turkey. It also engages in activities related to its sports teams, including broadcasting and sponsorship contracts, and advertising contracts. The company was formerly known as Trabzonspor Sportif Yatirim ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Trabzonspor Sportif Yatirim ve Futbol Isletmeciligi Ticaret A.S. in May 2011. The company was incorporated in 1994 and is based in Trabzon, Turkey. Trabzonspor Sportif Yatirim ve Futbol Isletmeciligi Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Trabzonspor Futbol Isletmeciligi Ticaret A.S.

stocks.name: Tugçelik Alüminyum Ve Metal Mamulleri Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Tugçelik Alüminyum Ve Metal Mamulleri Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. engages in the aluminum production in Turkey. It also involved melting, foundry, molding shop, CNC machining, and other processes activities. It serves automotive, white goods, telecommunication, agricultural equipment, electrical, and mechanical industries. Tugçelik Alüminyum Ve Metal Mamulleri Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Tukas Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Tukas Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells food products in Turkey and internationally. The company offers tomato and pepper pastes, grated tomatoes, pasta sauces, spreads, and condiments; roasted and canned products; boiled products; and pickles, ready to serve foods, jams, and olives, as well as catering products. It sells its products under the Tukas brand name. Tukas Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Tureks Turizm Tasimacilik Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Tureks Turizm Tasimacilik Anonim Sirketi engages in group transportation, and fleet and individual vehicle rental activities in Turkey. The company offers personnel, students, and public transportation, as well as fleet leasing and tourism services. It is also involved in special purpose projects, such as mobile coordination, mobile nursery, mobile kitchen, mobile health, mobile health screening, and mobile rally vehicles. The company was incorporated in 2002 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Türker Proje Gayrimenkul ve Yatirim Gelistirme A.S.
stocks.description: Türker Proje Gayrimenkul ve Yatirim Gelistirme A.S., owns and develops real estate properties in Turkey. The company was formerly known as Mutlu Yatirim Proje ve Gayrimenkul Gelistirme A.S. and changed its name to Türker Proje Gayrimenkul ve Yatirim Gelistirme A.S. in May 2015. The company was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Türker Proje Gayrimenkul ve Yatirim Gelistirme A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Turker Yatirim Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Türkiye Sigorta A.S.
stocks.description: Türkiye Sigorta A.S. operates as a non-life insurance company in Turkey. It offers auto and non-auto accident, fire, transportation, engineering, health, agriculture, liability, financial losses, credit, and legal protection insurance products. Türkiye Sigorta A.S. was formerly known as Günes Sigorta Anonim Sirketi and changed its name to Türkiye Sigorta A.S. in August 2020. The company was incorporated in 1957 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Türkiye Sigorta A.S. operates as a subsidiary of TVF Finansal Yatirimlar AS.

stocks.name: UFUK Yatirim Yonetim ve Gayrimenkul A.S.
stocks.description: UFUK Yatirim Yonetim ve Gayrimenkul A.S. engages in the financial leasing business in Turkey. It also offers business management and consultancy services, such as advisory on strategic, financial, marketing, business processes, and project services, as well as on trademark and franchise issues. The company was formerly known as Fon Sinai Yatirimlar A.S. and changed its name to UFUK Yatirim Yonetim ve Gayrimenkul A.S. in May 2016. UFUK Yatirim Yonetim ve Gayrimenkul A.S. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. UFUK Yatirim Yonetim ve Gayrimenkul A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Lydia Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Ulusal Faktoring A.S.
stocks.description: Ulusal Faktoring A.S. provides factoring services in Turkey. The company was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Ulusoy Elektrik Imalat Taahhüt ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.address: 1. Organize Sanayi Bölgesi Oguz Cad. No:6
stocks.description: Ulusoy Elektrik Imalat Taahhüt ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells electrical equipment for medium voltage power distribution networks and industrial plants in Turkey and Indonesia. It offers metal enclosed modular, metal clad, and gas insulated switchgears; and compact transformer substations, medium voltage distribution transformers and switchgear components, and medium voltage cable accessories. The company was incorporated in 1985 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey. Ulusoy Elektrik Imalat Taahhüt ve Ticaret A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Eaton Industries XX Unlimited Company.

stocks.name: Ulusoy Un Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Ulusoy Un Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells flour in Turkey. It operates through Production and Trade in Agricultural Commodities and Licensed Warehousing segments. The company offers baguette, sugar bread-toast bread, croissant, pastry, chapati, noodle, biscuit, all purpose flour, industrial wheat flour, pizza, and Arabic bread. It also engages in warehousing activities for the storage of agricultural products; production, wholesale, retail purchase, sale, distribution, import, and export of food products; manufacture, purchase, sale, import, and export of warehousing activities for the storage of agricultural products; buying and selling of real estate; and production, distribution, and trading of pasta. The company provides its products under the U Plus, U Pro, and U Chef brand names. It also exports its products. Ulusoy Un Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Samsun, Turkey.

stocks.name: Umpas Holding A.S.
stocks.description: Umpas Holding A.S. engages in the production and sell of ceramic products. It is also involved in the insurance and construction activities and assembly maintenance sectors. The company offers floor and wall tiles under the Seranova Seramik brand. It also operates chain stores and shopping malls in the retail sector under the name Anbera A.V.M. brand. In addition, the company is involved in the manufacturing and assembly of feed machines, steel constructions, soil processing facilities, manufactures machinery and steel constructions for ceramic factories, and manufactures ceramic molds. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Usak, Turkey.

stocks.name: ÜNLÜ Yatirim Holding A.S.
stocks.description: ÜNLÜ Yatirim Holding A.S. provides investment advisory and asset management services to investors, corporates, multinationals, and financial institutions in Turkey. It operates through Brokerage Activities and Corporate Financing Activities; Asset Management Financial Consultancy and Investment Services; Venture capital; and Investment Holding Services segments. The company offers corporate finance advisory, such as mergers and acquisitions, and corporate debt advisory services. It also provides capital markets services comprising public offerings and block sales, corporate sales, research services, and debt capital markets; and investment advisory and brokerage services, including equities, futures and options, mutual funds, structured debt instruments, over-the-counter derivatives, fixed-income securities, international markets, and portfolio brokerage services. In addition, the company offers asset management services, such as non-performing loans management; ?venture capital and private equity; ?treasury and cash management; and portfolio management services. ÜNLÜ Yatirim Holding A.S. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Usak Seramik Sanayi A.S.
stocks.address: Dilek Mahallesi Hüsnü Çakin Caddesi No:38
stocks.description: Usak Seramik Sanayi A.S. engages in the production and sale of ceramics in Turkey, the United States, Germany, Italy, Canada, and internationally. It offers ceramic wall tile, floor tile, kerb, décor, and porcelain, as well as border products. The company was formerly known as Usak Elektro Porselen Sanayi A.S and changed its name to Usak Seramik Sanayi A.S. in 1986. The company was incorporated in 1972 and is headquartered in Banaz, Turkey.

stocks.name: Vakif Finansal Kiralama A.S.
stocks.description: Vakif Finansal Kiralama A.S. engages in the provision of financial leasing services in Turkey. It also offers financial intermediation to SMEs and investors. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Vakif Finansal Kiralama A.S. is a subsidiary of Türkiye Vakiflar Bankasi Türk Anonim Ortakligi.

stocks.name: Vakko Tekstil ve Hazir Giyim Sanayi Isletmeleri A.S.
stocks.description: Vakko Tekstil ve Hazir Giyim Sanayi Isletmeleri A.S. manufactures and sells ready-made clothing and screen printing for men and women in Turkey. The company offers jackets, knitwear, shirt, T-shirts and sweatshirts, outerwear, and pants for women and men; dresses and jumpsuits, blouses, vest, skirts, bermuda and shorts, and scarfs and shawls for women; and suits, tuxedoes, and underwear for men. It also provides accessories, such as hats, jewelry, belts, shawl, umbrella, socks, ties, pocket square, bow ties, bracelet, cufflinks, beanie and hats, scarves, gloves; shoes, bags, and wallets, and monogram; beachwear, swimsuits, and bikinis; perfumes; hand and body care; nail polish; and chocolates. In addition, the company offers home decoration products, including furniture, office equipment, decorative home accessories, hobby accessories, table, candle and room diffuser, and bath accessories; table and bath textiles; cruise accessories; and pillows. The company offers products through its stores, as well as online under the brand name Vakko, Vakko Boutique, Vakkorama, VakkoWedding, VakkoHome, and WCollection. Vakko Tekstil ve Hazir Giyim Sanayi Isletmeleri A.S. was founded in 1934 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Vakko Tekstil ve Hazir Giyim Sanayi Isletmeleri A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Vakko Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Vanet Gida Sanayi Iç Ve Dis Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Vanet Gida Sanayi Iç Ve Dis Ticaret Anonim Sirketi engages in the production, processing, purchase, and sales of meat and meat products in Turkey. The company provides sausage, salami, and fried meat products. It also operates in the fields of establishing, operating, and renting. The company was founded in 1977 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: VBT Yazilim Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: VBT Yazilim Anonim Sirketi provides software, hardware, and consultancy services in Turkey. The company offers Heroty, an integrated human resources management platform; Flerpi commercial accounting software; e-transformation services; and VizyonIK, a web-based payroll and human resources management software. It also provides training, operating systems support, database support, application development, information systems service management consultancy, project management, process consultancy services, and modernization services. The company was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Verusaturk Girisim Sermayesi Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.address: Maslak Mah. Saat Sk. Spine Tower Sitesi No:5
stocks.description: Verusaturk Girisim Sermayesi Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is a private equity and venture capital firm specializing in bridge financing, recapitalizations, and growth capital investments. It prefers to invest in incubation, seed, startup ,early-mid-late venture, emerging growth, middle market, mature, turnaround, and later stage companies. The firm typically invests in following sectors: renewable energy, telecom, logistics, energy, technology and software, food, manufacturing, and mining. The firm prefers to invest in companies based in Turkey. The firm prefers to invest through its balance sheet investments. Verusaturk Girisim Sermayesi Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. was founded in January 09, 2012 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Verusaturk Girisim Sermayesi Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Verusa Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Verusa Holding A.S.
stocks.address: Maslak Mah. Saat Sk. Spine Tower Sitesi No:5
stocks.description: Verusa Holding A.S. is a private equity and venture capital firm specializing in recapitalizations, growth capital, restructuring, growth equity, growth stage, and Pre-Initial Public Offering companies. The firm invests in middle market; later stage; mature; turnaround; buyout ; emerging growth; seed/startup; and early, mid and late venture companies. It typically invests in communication services, innovation, software, renewable energy, chemistry, steel construction, information technology, venture capital, health, food, health sector hospitals, chemicals, metals and mining (Bauxite, Gold, Steel). The firm primarily invests in emerging market companies with focus on Turkey. It invests between ?5 million ($0.62 million) and ?100 million ($12.55 million) in preferred equity and in companies having turnover between ?5 million ($0.62 million) and ?400 million ($50.23 million). The firm supports it's investee companies to grow internally and through add-on acquisitions. The firm prefers to seek strong minority positions with substantial shareholder rights or majority investments. It prefers to exit it's investments from 3 to 7 years. It prefers to invest through growthh balance sheet investments. Verusa Holding A.S. was founded in 2006 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Vestel Beyaz Esya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Vestel Beyaz Esya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. engages in the production and sale of white goods in Turkey. The company produces and sells refrigerators, room air conditioning units, washing machines, cookers, dryers, dishwashers, and water heaters. It also exports its products. The company was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Vestel Beyaz Esya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Vestel Elektronik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.

stocks.name: Vakif Menkul Kiymet Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.address: Inkilap Mah. Dr. Adnan Büyükdeniz Cad. No:7A
stocks.description: Vakif Menkul Kiymet Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. operates a portfolio of capital market instruments and gold and other precious metals traded on national and international stock exchanges or organized over-the-counter markets in Turkey. The company was formerly known as Vakif B Tipi Menkul Kiymetler Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. and changed its name to Vakif Menkul Kiymet Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. in April 2014. Vakif Menkul Kiymet Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. was incorporated in 1991 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Viking Kagit ve Selüloz A.S.
stocks.description: Viking Kagit ve Selüloz A.S. engages in the production, marketing, and sale of semi-finished and finished tissue paper in Turkey. It offers toilet paper, towels, napkins, paper, box tissues, and wet wipes under the Premia, Lily, Senso, Select, Pufla, and Select Nature brand names. The company also exports its products to approximately 22 countries. The company was incorporated in 1969 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. Viking Kagit ve Selüloz A.S. is a subsidiary of Yasar Holding A.S.

stocks.name: Vakif Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi AS
stocks.address: Serifali Mah. Bayraktar Bulv. Nutuk Sok
stocks.description: Vakif Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi AS is a real estate investment trust. Vakif Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi AS is based in Turkey. Vakif Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi AS operates as a subsidiary of Türkiye Vakiflar Bankasi Türk Anonim Ortakligi.

stocks.name: Yaprak Süt ve Besi Çiftlikleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Yaprak Süt ve Besi Çiftlikleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is involved in the animal husbandry business in Turkey. The company breeds calf, heifers, and dairy animals, as well as provides bait and health services, as well as involved in milk production facilities. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Atasehir, Turkey.

stocks.name: Yatas Yatak ve Yorgan Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Yatas Yatak ve Yorgan Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells mattress, modular furniture, duvet, sofa, home textile and furniture. The company offers beds and mattresses protector and sleeping pad; pillow; home textile products that include bedding sets, bedspreads, pike, blanket, sheets and pillowcases, bathroom textiles, cushions, sofa throw, wedding gift set, and sleep set. It also offers base and headboard sets; home and sitting room products, such as TV blanket, slipper, pet bed; and baby shower set. It sells its products through stores and online. The company was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Yesil Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Yesil Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi provides technical planning, programming, budgeting, and project planning, and financial organization in Turkey. It also offers real estate valuation services; and consultancy in various areas, such as firm valuation, investment and research on commercial, and industrial and financial issues. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Yeo Teknoloji Enerji Ve Endustri Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Yeo Teknoloji Enerji Ve Endustri Anonim Sirketi engages in the design, engineering, procurement, integration, installation, and commissioning of automation, electrification, and digitization solutions in Turkey and internationally. It offers turnkey construction services comprising engineering, procurement, construction, assembly, testing, and commissioning processes for air and gas-insulated high-voltage substations and transmission lines; wind energy services in the fields of electrification, control systems, and construction; engages in the energy investment business; engineering, procurement, construction, and finance solutions; and end-to-end solutions for renewable energy. It also undertakes solar projects. In addition, it engages in energy storage and battery production business. Yeo Teknoloji Enerji Ve Endustri Anonim Sirketi was founded in 2004 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Yeni Gimat Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Yeni Gimat Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is a real estate investment trust. Yeni Gimat Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is based in Turkey.

stocks.name: Yukselen Celik Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Yukselen Celik Anonim Sirketi manufactures and sells steel products in Turkey and internationally. The company is also involved in production, import, export, domestic purchase, and sale of all kinds of iron and steel products, including carbon, manufacturing, construction, alloyed and unalloyed, tool stainless, and qualified and unqualified. It serves machinery, automotive, mold, iron and steel, shipbuilding, construction, and railway industries. The company was formerly known as Yukselen Celik Ticaret Limited Sirketi and changed its name to Yukselen Celik Anonim Sirketi in January 2013. Yukselen Celik Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1989 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Yünsa Yünlü Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Yünsa Yünlü Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. engages in the production and marketing of woolen textile products in Turkey and internationally. The company offers men and women fabrics; premium fabrics; corporate wear fabrics; and upholstery fabrics primarily used in commercial vehicle industry. It also provides wool blends, such as cashmere, silk, viscose, and other products. Yünsa Yünlü Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Yünsa Yünlü Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Sürmegöz Tekstil Yatirim A.S.

stocks.name: Yayla Agro Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
stocks.description: Yayla Agro Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells various food and grains in Turkey and internationally. It involved in the supply of food products, including paddy, bulgur, pulses, and shelled lentils; production of packaged ready to cook mix food, such as rice and bulgur mixed with various super and natural foods, such as dried tomatoes, dried mushrooms, and eggplant and other vegetables; production of rice, wheat, black beans, maize, beans, chickpeas, kidney beans, bulgur, paddy, lentils, and corn; ready to eat products, which includes pilaki, meaty dried beans and chickpeas, soups, bulgur and rice pilafs, pasta, compotes, legume and olive oil dishes, and grain and legum salads; and engages in trading of unprocessed cereals, grains, and pulses such as wheat, corn, barley, rice, paddy, and lentils as commercial goods. It also provides boiled products comprising boiled chickpeas, beans, ashura wheat, mexican beans, peas, quinoa, and grain corn; and seeds, such as red, black, white, and mixed quinoa, bulghur, chia, white chia, white chia seeds, beluga lentils, mung beans, basmati, sushi, black, and risotto rice, buckwheat, teff, amaranth, and flaxseed. In addition, it offers ezogelin soup with einkorn bulgur; lentil soup with quinoa; gourmet lentil soup; and Ala Çiftçi gourmet fit products. It serves hotels, restaurants, catering companies, restaurants, cafes, cafeterias, education, and health institutions. Yayla Agro Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1996 and is based in Kahramankazan, Turkey.

stocks.name: Zedur Enerji Elektrik Üretim Anonim Sirketi
stocks.description: Zedur Enerji Elektrik Üretim Anonim Sirketi primarily engages in the production, distribution, and sale of electricity in Turkey. The company generates electricity through hydroelectric and solar power plants. It is also involved in the provision of construction and contracting services for superstructure and infrastructure projects, including mass housing, office buildings, commercial centers, shopping malls, factories, luxury hotels, and holiday resorts, as well as infrastructure, canal, sewer, and tunnel construction projects; and the supply and sale of construction raw materials, intermediate materials, and supplies. The company was formerly known as Utopya Turizm Insaat Isletmecilik Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Zedur Enerji Elektrik Üretim Anonim Sirketi in September 2022. Zedur Enerji Elektrik Üretim Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

stocks.name: ZIRAAT PORTFOY BIST 50-30 HY BY
Zorlu Enerji Elektrik Üretim A.S.
stocks.description: Zorlu Enerji Elektrik Üretim A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the trading, distribution, retailing, and sales of electricity in Turkey and internationally. It is also involved in wholesale purchase of electrical energy and capacity and sales activities; engineering and consultancy activities for energy projects; operation and maintenance activities for energy projects and other; maintenance, repair, installation, and sale of charging stations; rental, leasing and other services of motorized light land vehicles and cars without adrives; aggregation, balancing service and other services; solar panel production and inverter sales; carbon selling; and panel production. Zorlu Enerji Elektrik Üretim A.S. was founded in 1993 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

stocks.name: Ziraat Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
stocks.description: Ziraat Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. operates as a real estate investment company in Turkey. Its portfolio consists of office building, and hotel and housing investments. The company was founded in 2016 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
